 4913|       |    fn test_toggle_write_mode_tracks_cursor_and_focus() {
 4914|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 4915|       |        app.view_mode = ViewMode::Raw;
 4916|       |        app.write_enabled = false;
 4917|       |        app.raw_focus_requested = false;
 4918|       |
 4919|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 4920|       |        store_raw_editor_cursor(&ctx, 3);
 4921|       |
 4922|       |        app.toggle_write_mode(&ctx);
 4923|       |        assert!(app.write_enabled);
 4924|       |        assert!(app.raw_focus_requested);
 4925|       |
 4926|       |        app.toggle_write_mode(&ctx);
 4927|       |        assert!(!app.write_enabled);
 4928|       |        assert_eq!(app.raw_cursor, Some(3));
 4929|       |    }

 4962|       |    #[test]
 4963|       |    fn test_update_impl_rendered_view_runs() -> Result<()> {
 4964|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 4965|       |        app.nav_request = Some(NavigationRequest::PageDown);
 4966|       |        app.toggle_fullscreen = true;
 4967|       |
 4968|       |        let mut temp_file = tempfile::Builder::new().suffix(".md").tempfile()?;
 4969|       |        temp_file.write_all(b"# Dropped\nContent")?;
 4970|       |        temp_file.flush()?;
 4971|       |
 4972|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 4973|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 4974|       |        let vp = input
 4975|       |            .viewports
 4976|       |            .get_mut(&egui::ViewportId::ROOT)
 4977|       |            .expect("root viewport");
 4978|       |        vp.monitor_size = Some(egui::vec2(1024.0, 768.0));
 4979|       |        vp.outer_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 4980|       |            egui::pos2(1200.0, 900.0),
 4981|       |            egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0),
 4982|       |        ));
 4983|       |        vp.inner_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 4984|       |            egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0),
 4985|       |            egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0),
 4986|       |        ));
 4987|       |        vp.fullscreen = Some(false);
 4988|       |        vp.maximized = Some(false);
 4989|       |        input.hovered_files.push(egui::HoveredFile {
 4990|       |            path: Some(temp_file.path().to_path_buf()),
 4991|       |            ..Default::default()
 4992|       |        });
 4993|       |        input.dropped_files.push(egui::DroppedFile {
 4994|       |            path: Some(temp_file.path().to_path_buf()),
 4995|       |            ..Default::default()
 4996|       |        });
 4997|       |
 4998|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 4999|       |
 5000|       |        assert!(app.drag_hover);
 5001|       |        assert!(app.current_file.is_some());
 5002|       |        assert!(app.last_window_pos.is_some());
 5003|       |        assert!(app.last_window_size.is_some());
 5004|       |        Ok(())
 5005|       |    }

 5110|       |    #[test]
 5111|       |    fn test_save_screenshot_image_crops_and_writes_metadata() -> Result<()> {
 5112|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new()?;
 5113|       |        let output_path = temp_dir.path().join("shot.png");
 5114|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 5115|       |            content_only: true,
 5116|       |            scroll_ratio: Some(0.5),
 5117|       |            font_source: Some("TestFont".to_string()),
 5118|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(output_path.clone())
 5119|       |        };
 5120|       |        let snapshot = ScreenshotSnapshot {
 5121|       |            content_rect: Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 5122|       |                egui::pos2(10.0, 5.0),
 5123|       |                egui::vec2(20.0, 10.0),
 5124|       |            )),
 5125|       |            stable_frames: 3,
 5126|       |            last_scroll_offset: Some(12.0),
 5127|       |            ..test_screenshot_snapshot(config)
 5128|       |        };
 5129|       |
 5130|       |        let mut image = egui::ColorImage::new([80, 60], Color32::BLACK);
 5131|       |        image.pixels[0] = Color32::from_rgb(10, 20, 30);
 5132|       |
 5133|       |        MarkdownViewerApp::save_screenshot_image(&image, &snapshot)?;
 5134|       |
 5135|       |        let saved = image::open(&output_path)?;
 5136|       |        assert_eq!(saved.width(), 20);
 5137|       |        assert_eq!(saved.height(), 10);
 5138|       |
 5139|       |        let metadata = std::fs::read_to_string(output_path.with_extension("json"))?;
 5140|       |        assert!(metadata.contains("\"content_only\": true"));
 5141|       |        assert!(metadata.contains("\"font_source\": \"TestFont\""));
 5142|       |        Ok(())
 5143|       |    }

 5145|       |    #[test]
 5146|       |    fn test_update_screenshot_state_requests_and_scrolls() {
 5147|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 5148|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 5149|       |            scroll_ratio: Some(0.5),
 5150|       |            theme: ScreenshotTheme::Dark,
 5151|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(temp_dir.path().join("shot.png"))
 5152|       |        };
 5153|       |
 5154|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5155|       |        app.set_screenshot_mode(config);
 5156|       |
 5157|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5158|       |        let snapshot = ScrollSnapshot {
 5159|       |            content_size: egui::vec2(100.0, 200.0),
 5160|       |            inner_rect: egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(100.0, 100.0)),
 5161|       |            offset_y: 0.0,
 5162|       |        };
 5163|       |        app.update_screenshot_state(&ctx, Some(1), Some(snapshot));
 5164|       |
 5165|       |        let target_offset = app
 5166|       |            .screenshot
 5167|       |            .as_ref()
 5168|       |            .and_then(|state| state.scroll_offset)
 5169|       |            .unwrap_or(0.0);
 5170|       |        let snapshot_ready = ScrollSnapshot {
 5171|       |            content_size: egui::vec2(100.0, 200.0),
 5172|       |            inner_rect: egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(100.0, 100.0)),
 5173|       |            offset_y: target_offset,
 5174|       |        };
 5175|       |        app.update_screenshot_state(&ctx, Some(1), Some(snapshot_ready));
 5176|       |
 5177|       |        let state = app.screenshot.as_ref().expect("screenshot state");
 5178|       |        assert!(state.viewport_adjusted);
 5179|       |        assert!(state.requested);
 5180|       |        assert!(state.scroll_ready());
 5181|       |    }
 5182|       |

 5366|       |        let image = egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::from_rgb(10, 20, 30));
 5367|       |
 5368|       |        let make_config = |name: &str| ScreenshotConfig {
 5369|       |            content_only: true,
 5370|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(temp_dir.path().join(name))
 5371|       |        };
 5372|       |

 5374|       |            content_rect: Some(egui::Rect::from_min_max(
 5375|       |                egui::pos2(0.0, 2.0),

 5377|       |            )),

 5379|       |        };

 5381|       |

 5383|       |            content_rect: Some(egui::Rect::from_min_max(
 5384|       |                egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0),
 5385|       |                egui::pos2(6.0, 10.0),
 5386|       |            )),
 5387|       |            ..test_screenshot_snapshot(make_config("shot_w.png"))
 5388|       |        };
 5389|       |        MarkdownViewerApp::save_screenshot_image(&image, &snapshot_w)?;
 5390|       |
 5391|       |        let snapshot_h = ScreenshotSnapshot {
 5392|       |            content_rect: Some(egui::Rect::from_min_max(
 5393|       |                egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0),
 5394|       |                egui::pos2(10.0, 6.0),
 5395|       |            )),
 5396|       |            ..test_screenshot_snapshot(make_config("shot_h.png"))
 5397|       |        };

 5401|       |        assert!(temp_dir.path().join("shot_w.png").exists());
 5402|       |        assert!(temp_dir.path().join("shot_h.png").exists());
 5403|       |        Ok(())
 5404|       |    }

 5468|       |    #[test]
 5469|       |    fn test_handle_shortcuts_navigation_keys() {
 5470|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5471|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5472|       |
 5473|       |        let nav_cases = [
 5474|       |            (egui::Key::PageUp, NavigationRequest::PageUp),
 5475|       |            (egui::Key::PageDown, NavigationRequest::PageDown),
 5476|       |            (egui::Key::Home, NavigationRequest::Top),
 5477|       |            (egui::Key::End, NavigationRequest::Bottom),
 5478|       |            (egui::Key::ArrowUp, NavigationRequest::ScrollUp),
 5479|       |            (egui::Key::ArrowDown, NavigationRequest::ScrollDown),
 5480|       |        ];
 5481|       |        for (key, expected) in nav_cases {
 5482|       |            app.nav_request = None;
 5483|       |            let mut input = default_input();
 5484|       |            input.events.push(key_event(key, egui::Modifiers::NONE));
 5485|       |            let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 5486|       |                app.handle_shortcuts(ctx);
 5487|       |            });
 5488|       |            assert_eq!(
 5489|       |                std::mem::discriminant(&app.nav_request),
 5490|       |                std::mem::discriminant(&Some(expected)),
 5491|       |                "failed for key {:?}",
 5492|       |                key,
 5493|       |            );
 5494|       |        }
 5495|       |    }

 5498|       |    fn test_handle_shortcuts_escape_clears_search() {
 5499|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5500|       |        app.show_search = true;
 5501|       |        app.search_query = "alpha".to_string();
 5502|       |        app.last_query = "alpha".to_string();
 5503|       |        app.last_match_index = Some(0);
 5504|       |        app.pending_scroll_to_element = Some(1);
 5505|       |
 5506|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 5507|       |        input
 5508|       |            .events
 5509|       |            .push(key_event(egui::Key::Escape, egui::Modifiers::NONE));
 5510|       |
 5511|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5512|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 5513|       |            app.handle_shortcuts(ctx);
 5514|       |        });
 5515|       |
 5516|       |        assert!(!app.show_search);
 5517|       |        assert!(app.search_query.is_empty());
 5518|       |        assert!(app.last_query.is_empty());
 5519|       |        assert!(app.last_match_index.is_none());
 5520|       |        assert!(app.pending_scroll_to_element.is_none());
 5521|       |    }

 5524|       |    fn test_update_search_results_updates_matches() {
 5525|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5526|       |        app.load_content("Alpha\n\nBeta\n\nGamma", Some("Search".to_string()));
 5527|       |
 5528|       |        app.search_query = "beta".to_string();
 5529|       |        app.update_search_results("");
 5530|       |        assert_eq!(app.last_query, "beta");
 5531|       |        assert_eq!(app.last_match_index, Some(1));
 5532|       |        assert_eq!(app.pending_scroll_to_element, Some(1));
 5533|       |
 5534|       |        app.search_query.clear();
 5535|       |        app.update_search_results("beta");
 5536|       |        assert!(app.last_query.is_empty());
 5537|       |    }

 5609|       |    fn test_render_helpers_cover_ui_paths() {
 5610|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5611|       |        app.current_content = "Hello".to_string();
 5612|       |        app.pending_files.push_back(PathBuf::from("queued.md"));
 5613|       |        app.drag_hover = true;
 5614|       |        app.show_search = true;
 5615|       |        app.search_query = "welcome".to_string();
 5616|       |
 5617|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5618|       |        let _ = ctx.run(default_input(), |ctx| {
 5619|       |            CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 5620|       |                app.render_file_menu_contents(ui, false, Color32::WHITE);
 5621|       |                app.render_view_menu_contents(ui, ctx, false, Color32::WHITE);
 5622|       |                app.render_help_menu_contents(ui, false, Color32::WHITE);
 5623|       |            });
 5624|       |            app.render_status_bar(ctx);
 5625|       |            app.render_search_dialog(ctx);
 5626|       |            app.render_drag_overlay(ctx);
 5627|       |        });
 5628|       |
 5629|       |        assert!(app.show_search);
 5630|       |    }

 5720|       |    fn test_restore_from_history_sets_state() {
 5721|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5722|       |        app.current_content = "first".to_string();
 5723|       |        app.current_file = Some(PathBuf::from("first.md"));
 5724|       |        app.title = "mdmdview - first".to_string();
 5725|       |        app.push_history();
 5726|       |
 5727|       |        app.current_content = "second".to_string();
 5728|       |        app.current_file = None;
 5729|       |        app.title = "mdmdview - second".to_string();
 5730|       |        app.push_history();
 5731|       |
 5732|       |        app.history_index = 0;
 5733|       |        app.restore_from_history();
 5734|       |
 5735|       |        assert_eq!(app.current_file, Some(PathBuf::from("first.md")));
 5736|       |        assert_eq!(app.current_content, "first");
 5737|       |        assert_eq!(app.pending_scroll_to_element, Some(0));
 5738|       |    }

 5754|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5755|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new()?;
 5756|       |        let good1 = temp_dir.path().join("good1.md");
 5757|       |        let good2 = temp_dir.path().join("good2.md");
 5758|       |        let bad = temp_dir.path().join("bad.pdf");
 5759|       |        std::fs::write(&good1, "# Good1")?;
 5760|       |        std::fs::write(&good2, "# Good2")?;
 5761|       |        std::fs::write(&bad, "nope")?;
 5762|       |
 5763|       |        app.handle_file_drop(vec![bad, good1.clone(), good2.clone()]);
 5764|       |
 5765|       |        assert_eq!(app.current_file, Some(good1));
 5766|       |        assert!(app.pending_files.contains(&good2));
 5767|       |        assert!(app.error_message.is_some());
 5768|       |        Ok(())
 5769|       |    }

 5797|       |    #[test]
 5798|       |    fn test_move_raw_cursor_lines_up_and_down() {
 5799|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 5800|       |        setup_raw_write_mode(&mut app, "Line 1\nLine 2\nLine 3");
 5801|       |
 5802|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5803|       |        store_raw_editor_cursor(&ctx, 0);
 5804|       |
 5805|       |        app.move_raw_cursor_lines(&ctx, 1);
 5806|       |        let down_idx = app.raw_cursor.unwrap_or(0);
 5807|       |        assert!(down_idx > 0);
 5808|       |
 5809|       |        app.move_raw_cursor_lines(&ctx, -1);
 5810|       |        let up_idx = app.raw_cursor.unwrap_or(0);
 5811|       |        assert!(up_idx <= down_idx);
 5812|       |    }

 5969|       |    #[test]
 5970|       |    fn test_compute_window_adjustment_clamps() {
 5971|       |        let outer = egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(-100.0, -100.0), egui::vec2(200.0, 100.0));
 5972|       |        let monitor = egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0);
 5973|       |        let adjusted =
 5974|       |            MarkdownViewerApp::compute_window_adjustment(Some(outer), Some(outer), Some(monitor));
 5975|       |        assert!(adjusted.is_some());
 5976|       |
 5977|       |        let outer_ok = egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(10.0, 10.0), egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0));
 5978|       |        let unchanged = MarkdownViewerApp::compute_window_adjustment(
 5979|       |            Some(outer_ok),
 5980|       |            Some(outer_ok),
 5981|       |            Some(monitor),
 5982|       |        );
 5983|       |        assert!(unchanged.is_none());
 5984|       |    }

 6004|       |        app.current_content = "Hello".to_string();
 6005|       |        app.parsed_elements = vec![MarkdownElement::Paragraph(vec![InlineSpan::Text(
 6006|       |            "Hello".to_string(),
 6007|       |        )])];
 6008|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");

 6011|       |        let save_path = temp_dir.path().join("save.md");
 6012|       |        let _forced = ForcedDialogPaths::new(Some(open_path), Some(save_path));
 6013|       |        let _actions = ForcedAppActions::new(&[
 6014|       |            "menu_open",

 6024|       |            "menu_help_about",
 6025|       |            "menu_back",
 6026|       |            "menu_forward",
 6027|       |            "menu_raw",
 6028|       |            "menu_write",
 6029|       |            "menu_wrap_raw",
 6030|       |            "menu_zoom_in",
 6031|       |            "menu_zoom_out",

 6033|       |            "menu_fullscreen",
 6034|       |            "ctx_copy_all",
 6035|       |            "ctx_copy_markdown",
 6036|       |            "ctx_nav_top",
 6037|       |            "ctx_nav_bottom",
 6038|       |            "search_next",
 6039|       |            "search_prev",
 6040|       |            "search_close",
 6041|       |            "status_hover",
 6042|       |            "welcome_open",

 6044|       |            "usage.md",
 6045|       |        ]);
 6046|       |

 6050|       |                app.render_file_menu_contents(ui, false, Color32::WHITE);

 6056|       |            app.render_search_dialog(ctx);

 6080|       |    #[test]
 6081|       |    fn test_render_search_dialog_close_clears_state() {
 6082|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 6083|       |        app.parsed_elements = vec![MarkdownElement::Paragraph(vec![InlineSpan::Text(
 6084|       |            "Alpha".to_string(),
 6085|       |        )])];
 6086|       |        app.show_search = true;
 6087|       |        app.search_query = "Alpha".to_string();
 6088|       |        app.last_query = "Alpha".to_string();
 6089|       |        app.last_match_index = Some(0);
 6090|       |        app.pending_scroll_to_element = Some(1);
 6091|       |        let _actions = ForcedAppActions::new(&["search_close"]);
 6092|       |
 6093|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6094|       |        let _ = ctx.run(default_input(), |ctx| {
 6095|       |            app.render_search_dialog(ctx);
 6096|       |        });
 6097|       |
 6098|       |        assert!(!app.show_search);
 6099|       |        assert!(app.search_query.is_empty());
 6100|       |        assert!(app.last_query.is_empty());
 6101|       |        assert!(app.last_match_index.is_none());
 6102|       |        assert!(app.pending_scroll_to_element.is_none());
 6103|       |    }

 6586|       |    fn test_update_impl_raw_edit_updates_content() {

 6588|       |        app.view_mode = ViewMode::Raw;
 6589|       |        app.write_enabled = true;
 6590|       |        app.raw_focus_requested = true;
 6591|       |        app.raw_buffer = "Line".to_string();
 6592|       |        app.current_content = app.raw_buffer.clone();
 6593|       |
 6594|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6595|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 6596|       |        input.focused = true;
 6597|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 6598|       |
 6599|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 6600|       |        input.focused = true;
 6601|       |        input.events.push(egui::Event::Text("X".to_string()));
 6602|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 6603|       |
 6604|       |        assert!(app.current_content.contains('X'));
 6605|       |    }
 6606|       |

 6611|       |        app.write_enabled = true;

 6648|       |    fn test_save_screenshot_image_creates_parent_dir() -> Result<()> {
 6649|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new()?;
 6650|       |        let nested = temp_dir.path().join("nested").join("shot.png");
 6651|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 6652|       |            viewport_width: 40.0,
 6653|       |            viewport_height: 30.0,
 6654|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(nested.clone())
 6655|       |        };
 6656|       |        let snapshot = test_screenshot_snapshot(config);
 6657|       |        let image = egui::ColorImage::new([40, 30], Color32::WHITE);
 6658|       |        MarkdownViewerApp::save_screenshot_image(&image, &snapshot)?;
 6659|       |        assert!(nested.exists());
 6660|       |        assert!(nested.with_extension("json").exists());
 6661|       |        Ok(())
 6662|       |    }

 6698|       |    #[test]
 6699|       |    fn test_handle_screenshot_events_branches() {
 6700|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 6701|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6702|       |
 6703|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 6704|       |        input
 6705|       |            .events
 6706|       |            .push(key_event(egui::Key::A, egui::Modifiers::NONE));
 6707|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 6708|       |            app.handle_screenshot_events(ctx);
 6709|       |        });
 6710|       |
 6711|       |        let image = egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE);
 6712|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 6713|       |        input.events.push(egui::Event::Screenshot {
 6714|       |            viewport_id: egui::ViewportId::ROOT,
 6715|       |            image: std::sync::Arc::new(image),
 6716|       |        });
 6717|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 6718|       |            app.handle_screenshot_events(ctx);
 6719|       |        });
 6720|       |
 6721|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 6722|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 6723|       |            viewport_width: 40.0,
 6724|       |            viewport_height: 30.0,
 6725|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(temp_dir.path().to_path_buf())
 6726|       |        };
 6727|       |        app.screenshot = Some(ScreenshotState::new(config));
 6728|       |        let state = app.screenshot.as_mut().expect("screenshot state");
 6729|       |        state.done = true;
 6730|       |        let image = egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE);
 6731|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 6732|       |        input.events.push(egui::Event::Screenshot {
 6733|       |            viewport_id: egui::ViewportId::ROOT,
 6734|       |            image: std::sync::Arc::new(image),
 6735|       |        });
 6736|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 6737|       |            app.handle_screenshot_events(ctx);
 6738|       |        });
 6739|       |    }

 6741|       |    #[test]
 6742|       |    fn test_screenshot_state_helpers() {
 6743|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 6744|       |            viewport_width: 120.0,
 6745|       |            scroll_ratio: Some(0.5),
 6746|       |            wait_ms: 500,
 6747|       |            settle_frames: 2,
 6748|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(PathBuf::from("dummy.png"))
 6749|       |        };
 6750|       |        let mut state = ScreenshotState::new(config);
 6751|       |        assert!(!state.scroll_ready());
 6752|       |
 6753|       |        let snapshot = ScrollSnapshot {
 6754|       |            content_size: egui::vec2(200.0, 400.0),
 6755|       |            inner_rect: egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(200.0, 200.0)),
 6756|       |            offset_y: 0.0,
 6757|       |        };
 6758|       |        assert!(state.record_scroll(snapshot));
 6759|       |        assert!(!state.record_scroll(snapshot));
 6760|       |
 6761|       |        state.update_stability(None, None);
 6762|       |        state.last_scroll_offset = Some(0.0);
 6763|       |        state.update_stability(Some(1), Some(10.0));
 6764|       |    }

 6767|       |    fn test_screenshot_is_stable_requires_no_pending() {
 6768|       |        assert!(MarkdownViewerApp::screenshot_is_stable(true, 2, 2, false));
 6769|       |        assert!(!MarkdownViewerApp::screenshot_is_stable(true, 2, 2, true));
 6770|       |        assert!(!MarkdownViewerApp::screenshot_is_stable(false, 2, 2, false));
 6771|       |        assert!(!MarkdownViewerApp::screenshot_is_stable(true, 1, 2, false));
 6772|       |    }

 6777|       |            viewport_width: 120.0,
 6778|       |            wait_ms: 500,
 6779|       |            settle_frames: 2,
 6780|       |            ..test_screenshot_config(PathBuf::from("dummy.png"))
 6781|       |        };
 6782|       |        let mut state = ScreenshotState::new(config);
 6783|       |        let snapshot = ScrollSnapshot {
 6784|       |            content_size: egui::vec2(200.0, 400.0),
 6785|       |            inner_rect: egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(200.0, 200.0)),
 6786|       |            offset_y: 0.0,
 6787|       |        };
 6788|       |        assert!(!state.record_scroll(snapshot));
 6789|       |        assert!(state.scroll_offset.is_none());

 6986|       |    fn test_push_history_caps_max() {
 6987|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 6988|       |        app.max_history = 1;
 6989|       |        app.current_content = "First".to_string();
 6990|       |        app.title = "First".to_string();
 6991|       |        app.push_history();
 6992|       |
 6993|       |        app.current_content = "Second".to_string();
 6994|       |        app.title = "Second".to_string();
 6995|       |        app.push_history();
 6996|       |

 7016|       |                file_path: None,
 7017|       |                title: "One".to_string(),
 7018|       |                content: "One".to_string(),
 7019|       |            },
 7020|       |            HistoryEntry {
 7021|       |                file_path: None,
 7022|       |                title: "Two".to_string(),

 7024|       |            },
 7025|       |        ];

 7027|       |

 7048|       |    #[test]
 7049|       |    fn test_open_file_dialog_load_error() -> Result<()> {
 7050|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7051|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new()?;
 7052|       |        let open_path = temp_dir.path().join("open.md");
 7053|       |        std::fs::write(&open_path, "# Open")?;
 7054|       |        let _forced_path = ForcedDialogPaths::new(Some(open_path), None);
 7055|       |        let _forced_load = force_load_error();
 7056|       |
 7057|       |        app.open_file_dialog();
 7058|       |        assert!(app
 7059|       |            .error_message
 7060|       |            .as_ref()
 7061|       |            .is_some_and(|msg| msg.contains("Failed to open file")));
 7062|       |        Ok(())
 7063|       |    }

 7274|       |    #[test]
 7275|       |    fn test_update_impl_persists_window_state_when_due() {
 7276|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7277|       |        let temp_dir = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 7278|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp_dir.path());
 7279|       |
 7280|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7281|       |        app.last_persist_instant = std::time::Instant::now() - std::time::Duration::from_secs(2);
 7282|       |
 7283|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7284|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 7285|       |        let vp = input
 7286|       |            .viewports
 7287|       |            .get_mut(&egui::ViewportId::ROOT)
 7288|       |            .expect("root viewport");
 7289|       |        vp.monitor_size = Some(egui::vec2(1024.0, 768.0));
 7290|       |        vp.outer_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7291|       |            egui::pos2(10.0, 10.0),
 7292|       |            egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0),
 7293|       |        ));
 7294|       |        vp.inner_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7295|       |            egui::pos2(20.0, 20.0),
 7296|       |            egui::vec2(780.0, 580.0),
 7297|       |        ));
 7298|       |        vp.fullscreen = Some(false);
 7299|       |        vp.maximized = Some(false);
 7300|       |
 7301|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 7302|       |
 7303|       |        let path = config_dir.join("window_state.txt");
 7304|       |        assert!(path.exists());
 7305|       |        assert!(app.last_persisted_state.is_some());
 7306|       |    }

 7308|       |    #[test]
 7309|       |    fn test_update_impl_fullscreen_skips_size_persist() {
 7310|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7311|       |        app.last_window_size = None;
 7312|       |
 7313|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7314|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 7315|       |        let vp = input
 7316|       |            .viewports
 7317|       |            .get_mut(&egui::ViewportId::ROOT)
 7318|       |            .expect("root viewport");
 7319|       |        vp.monitor_size = Some(egui::vec2(1024.0, 768.0));
 7320|       |        vp.outer_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7321|       |            egui::pos2(10.0, 10.0),
 7322|       |            egui::vec2(800.0, 600.0),
 7323|       |        ));
 7324|       |        vp.inner_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7325|       |            egui::pos2(20.0, 20.0),
 7326|       |            egui::vec2(780.0, 580.0),
 7327|       |        ));
 7328|       |        vp.fullscreen = Some(true);
 7329|       |        vp.maximized = Some(false);
 7330|       |
 7331|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 7332|       |
 7333|       |        assert!(app.last_window_size.is_none());
 7334|       |    }
 7335|       |
 7336|       |    #[test]
 7337|       |    fn test_update_impl_maximized_skips_size_and_pos_tracking() {
 7338|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7339|       |        app.last_window_size = None;
 7340|       |        app.last_window_pos = None;
 7341|       |
 7342|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7343|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 7344|       |        let vp = input
 7345|       |            .viewports
 7346|       |            .get_mut(&egui::ViewportId::ROOT)
 7347|       |            .expect("root viewport");
 7348|       |        vp.monitor_size = Some(egui::vec2(1920.0, 1080.0));
 7349|       |        vp.outer_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7350|       |            egui::pos2(-8.0, -8.0),
 7351|       |            egui::vec2(1936.0, 1096.0),
 7352|       |        ));
 7353|       |        vp.inner_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7354|       |            egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0),
 7355|       |            egui::vec2(1920.0, 1048.0),
 7356|       |        ));
 7357|       |        vp.fullscreen = Some(false);
 7358|       |        vp.maximized = Some(true);
 7359|       |
 7360|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 7361|       |
 7362|       |        // Pos and size should NOT be updated when maximized
 7363|       |        assert!(app.last_window_size.is_none());
 7364|       |        assert!(app.last_window_pos.is_none());
 7365|       |        // But maximized flag should be tracked
 7366|       |        assert!(app.last_window_maximized);
 7367|       |    }
 7368|       |
 7369|       |    #[test]
 7370|       |    fn test_update_impl_maximized_preserves_pre_maximize_geometry() {
 7371|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7372|       |        // Simulate pre-maximize state: window at (50,50) with size 900x700
 7373|       |        app.last_window_pos = Some([50.0, 50.0]);
 7374|       |        app.last_window_size = Some([900.0, 700.0]);
 7375|       |        app.last_window_maximized = false;
 7376|       |
 7377|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7378|       |        let mut input = default_input();
 7379|       |        let vp = input
 7380|       |            .viewports
 7381|       |            .get_mut(&egui::ViewportId::ROOT)
 7382|       |            .expect("root viewport");
 7383|       |        vp.monitor_size = Some(egui::vec2(1920.0, 1080.0));
 7384|       |        // Maximized window: outer extends beyond screen, inner fills it
 7385|       |        vp.outer_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7386|       |            egui::pos2(-8.0, -8.0),
 7387|       |            egui::vec2(1936.0, 1096.0),
 7388|       |        ));
 7389|       |        vp.inner_rect = Some(egui::Rect::from_min_size(
 7390|       |            egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0),
 7391|       |            egui::vec2(1920.0, 1048.0),
 7392|       |        ));
 7393|       |        vp.fullscreen = Some(false);
 7394|       |        vp.maximized = Some(true);
 7395|       |
 7396|       |        run_app_frame(&mut app, &ctx, input);
 7397|       |
 7398|       |        // Pre-maximize geometry must be preserved, not overwritten with maximized dimensions
 7399|       |        assert_eq!(app.last_window_pos, Some([50.0, 50.0]));
 7400|       |        assert_eq!(app.last_window_size, Some([900.0, 700.0]));
 7401|       |        assert!(app.last_window_maximized);
 7402|       |    }

 7495|       |    fn test_update_screenshot_state_requested_done_skips_repaint() {
 7496|       |        let temp_dir = tempfile::TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 7497|       |        let config = ScreenshotConfig {
 7498|       |            viewport_width: 200.0,
 7499|       |            viewport_height: 100.0,

 7502|       |        };

 7508|       |        app.screenshot = Some(state);

 7518|       |    #[test]
 7519|       |    fn test_env_guard_removes_unset_key() {
 7520|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7521|       |        std::env::remove_var("MDMDVIEW_TMP_ENV");
 7522|       |        {
 7523|       |            let _guard = EnvGuard::set("MDMDVIEW_TMP_ENV", "value");
 7524|       |        }

 7571|       |    #[test]
 7572|       |    fn test_poll_readability_discards_stale_result() {
 7573|       |        let mut app = MarkdownViewerApp::new();
 7574|       |        // Set current request ID to 5
 7575|       |        app.readability_request_id = 5;
 7576|       |        // Send a stale result with ID 3 (mismatches)
 7577|       |        let _ = app.readability_tx.send(ReadabilityRequest {
 7578|       |            id: 3,
 7579|       |            content: "Stale content here.".to_string(),
 7580|       |        });
 7581|       |        // Give the background thread time to process
 7582|       |        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(100));
 7583|       |        app.poll_readability();
 7584|       |        // Stale result should be discarded
 7585|       |        assert!(app.readability_stats.is_none());
 7586|       |
 7587|       |        // Now send a matching result
 7588|       |        let _ = app.readability_tx.send(ReadabilityRequest {
 7589|       |            id: 5,
 7590|       |            content: "Matching content here.".to_string(),
 7591|       |        });
 7592|       |        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(100));
 7593|       |        app.poll_readability();
 7594|       |        // Matching result should be accepted
 7595|       |        assert!(app.readability_stats.is_some());
 7596|       |    }

 7812|       |        std::fs::write(temp.path(), "# Test")?;

 7814|       |        app.copy_file_to_clipboard();

   25|       |//! Full Test Runner for mdmdview
   26|       |//!
   27|       |//! Runs all quality checks, tests, Mermaid visual comparisons, D2 visual
   28|       |//! regression tests, and coverage in a single invocation, then generates
   29|       |//! a self-contained HTML report.
   30|       |//!
   31|       |//! Phases (run sequentially, fast-to-slow):
   32|       |//! 1. Code quality checks (cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy)
   33|       |//! 2. Unit + D2 tests (cargo test --release --lib --tests --workspace)
   34|       |//! 3. Mermaid visual tests (screenshot comparison against reference images)
   35|       |//!    3b. D2 visual tests (SVG rasterization comparison against d2 CLI)
   36|       |//! 4. Coverage analysis (cargo llvm-cov, optional)
   37|       |//!
   38|       |//! Usage:
   39|       |//!   cargo run --release --bin full_test
   40|       |//!
   41|       |//! Options:
   42|       |//!   --skip-quality           Skip fmt/clippy checks
   43|       |//!   --skip-coverage          Skip coverage analysis
   44|       |//!   --skip-mermaid           Skip Mermaid visual tests
   45|       |//!   --skip-d2-visual         Skip D2 visual regression tests
   46|       |//!   --update-d2-references   Regenerate D2 reference PNGs from d2 CLI
   47|       |//!   --quick                  Exclude ignored tests
   48|       |//!   --help, -h               Show this help message
   49|       |
   50|       |use chrono::Local;
   51|       |use std::io::Write;
   52|       |use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
   53|       |use std::process::{Command, Stdio};
   54|       |use std::time::{Duration, Instant};
   55|       |
   56|       |const VERSION: &str = env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION");
   57|       |
   58|       |// ── Mermaid visual test constants ───────────────────────────────────────
   59|       |
   60|       |const MERMAID_THRESHOLD_PERCENT: f64 = 12.0;
   61|       |const MERMAID_THRESHOLD_PIXELS: usize = 45_000;
   62|       |const MERMAID_PIXEL_TOLERANCE: u8 = 60;
   63|       |const MERMAID_SCREENSHOT_WIDTH: u32 = 1280;
   64|       |const MERMAID_SCREENSHOT_HEIGHT: u32 = 720;
   65|       |const MERMAID_WAIT_MS: u32 = 3000;
   66|       |const MERMAID_SETTLE_FRAMES: u32 = 5;
   67|       |
   68|       |/// Per-case overrides for Mermaid visual tests.
   69|       |/// Mindmap needs extra rendering time.
   70|      6|fn mermaid_wait_ms_for_case(case_name: &str) -> u32 {
   71|      6|    match case_name {
   72|      6|        "mindmap" => 12_000,
                                   ^2
   73|      4|        _ => MERMAID_WAIT_MS,
   74|       |    }
   75|      6|}
   76|       |

   78|       |

   80|       |const D2_THRESHOLD_PERCENT: f64 = 20.0; // Generous — different renderers
   81|       |const D2_THRESHOLD_PIXELS: usize = 80_000;
   82|       |

  639|      6|    a: &image::RgbaImage,
  640|      6|    b: &image::RgbaImage,
  641|      6|) -> (image::RgbaImage, image::RgbaImage) {

  664|       |/// Per-pixel diff between two same-sized RGBA images.
  665|       |/// Returns (count of pixels exceeding tolerance, maximum channel delta).
  666|      8|fn diff_images(
  667|      8|    actual: &image::RgbaImage,
  668|      8|    reference: &image::RgbaImage,
  669|      8|    tolerance: u8,
  670|      8|) -> (usize, u8) {
  671|      8|    let mut diff_pixels = 0usize;
  672|      8|    let mut max_delta = 0u8;
  673|       |
  674|    608|    for (a_px, r_px) in actual.pixels().zip(reference.pixels()) {
                                      ^8     ^8       ^8  ^8        ^8
  675|    608|        let delta = a_px
  676|    608|            .0
  677|    608|            .iter()
  678|    608|            .zip(r_px.0.iter())
  679|  2.43k|            .map(|(&av, &rv)| av.abs_diff(rv))
                           ^608
  680|    608|            .max()
  681|    608|            .unwrap_or(0);
  682|       |
  683|    608|        if delta > tolerance {
  ------------------
  |  Branch (683:12): [True: 202, False: 406]
  ------------------
  684|    202|            diff_pixels += 1;
  685|    406|        }
  686|    608|        if delta > max_delta {
  ------------------
  |  Branch (686:12): [True: 6, False: 602]
  ------------------
  687|      6|            max_delta = delta;
  688|    602|        }
  689|       |    }
  690|       |
  691|      8|    (diff_pixels, max_delta)

  974|      0|    output: &Path,

 1458|       |/// Extract a number from nested JSON structure.
 1459|       |/// Looks for section_key, then within that section finds value_key and extracts the number.
 1460|     24|fn extract_json_number(json: &str, section_key: &str, value_key: &str) -> Option<usize> {
 1461|     24|    let section_start = json.find(section_key)?;
                      ^22                                   ^2
 1462|     22|    let section = &json[section_start..];
 1463|     22|    let brace_start = section.find('{')?;
                                                     ^0
 1464|     22|    let section_content = &section[brace_start..];
 1465|     22|    let brace_end = section_content.find('}')?;
                                                           ^0
 1466|     22|    let inner = &section_content[..brace_end];
 1467|       |
 1468|     22|    let value_start = inner.find(value_key)?;
                      ^20                                ^2
 1469|     20|    let after_key = &inner[value_start + value_key.len()..];
 1470|     20|    let after_colon = after_key.trim_start().strip_prefix(':')?;
                                                                            ^0
 1471|     20|    let num_str = after_colon.trim_start();
 1472|       |
 1473|     20|    let end = num_str
 1474|     68|        .find(|c: char| !c.is_ascii_digit())
                       ^20
 1475|     20|        .unwrap_or(num_str.len());
 1476|     20|    num_str[..end].parse().ok()

 1493|      6|fn run_full_test<F>(
 1494|      6|    options: &FullTestOptions,
 1495|      6|    mut test_runner: F,
 1496|      6|    now: chrono::DateTime<Local>,
 1497|      6|) -> RunOutcome
 1498|      6|where
 1499|      6|    F: FnMut(bool) -> SuiteResults,
 1500|       |{
 1501|      6|    let overall_start = Instant::now();
 1502|      6|    println!("=== mdmdview Full Test Suite ===\n");
 1503|       |
 1504|       |    // Phase 1: Quality checks (fast feedback)
 1505|      6|    let quality_results = if !options.skip_quality {
  ------------------
  |  Branch (1505:30): [True: 0, False: 2]
  ------------------

 2171|       |#[cfg(test)]
 2172|       |#[cfg_attr(coverage_nightly, coverage(off))]
 2173|       |mod tests {
 2174|       |    use super::*;
 2175|       |
 2176|       |    fn make_result(name: &str, passed: bool) -> TestResult {
 2177|       |        TestResult {
 2178|       |            name: name.to_string(),
 2179|       |            passed,
 2180|       |            duration: Duration::ZERO,
 2181|       |            output: String::new(),
 2182|       |        }
 2183|       |    }
 2184|       |
 2185|       |    fn make_suite(
 2186|       |        passed: usize,
 2187|       |        failed: usize,
 2188|       |        skipped: usize,
 2189|       |        tests: Vec<TestResult>,
 2190|       |    ) -> SuiteResults {
 2191|       |        SuiteResults {
 2192|       |            mode: "tests".to_string(),
 2193|       |            total: passed + failed + skipped,
 2194|       |            passed,
 2195|       |            failed,
 2196|       |            skipped,
 2197|       |            duration: Duration::from_secs(5),
 2198|       |            tests,
 2199|       |        }
 2200|       |    }
 2201|       |
 2202|       |    // ── Option parsing tests ────────────────────────────────────────
 2203|       |
 2204|       |    #[test]
 2205|       |    fn test_parse_options_defaults() {
 2206|       |        let args = vec!["full_test".to_string()];
 2207|       |        let options = parse_options(&args).unwrap();
 2208|       |        assert!(!options.quick);
 2209|       |        assert!(!options.skip_quality);
 2210|       |        assert!(!options.skip_coverage);
 2211|       |        assert!(!options.skip_mermaid);
 2212|       |        assert!(!options.skip_d2_visual);
 2213|       |        assert!(!options.update_d2_references);
 2214|       |    }
 2215|       |
 2216|       |    #[test]
 2217|       |    fn test_parse_options_all_flags() {
 2218|       |        let args = vec![
 2219|       |            "full_test".to_string(),
 2220|       |            "--quick".to_string(),
 2221|       |            "--skip-quality".to_string(),
 2222|       |            "--skip-coverage".to_string(),
 2223|       |            "--skip-mermaid".to_string(),
 2224|       |            "--skip-d2-visual".to_string(),
 2225|       |        ];
 2226|       |        let options = parse_options(&args).unwrap();
 2227|       |        assert!(options.quick);
 2228|       |        assert!(options.skip_quality);
 2229|       |        assert!(options.skip_coverage);
 2230|       |        assert!(options.skip_mermaid);
 2231|       |        assert!(options.skip_d2_visual);
 2232|       |    }
 2233|       |
 2234|       |    #[test]
 2235|       |    fn test_parse_options_help_returns_none() {
 2236|       |        let args = vec!["full_test".to_string(), "--help".to_string()];
 2237|       |        assert!(parse_options(&args).is_none());
 2238|       |
 2239|       |        let args = vec!["full_test".to_string(), "-h".to_string()];
 2240|       |        assert!(parse_options(&args).is_none());
 2241|       |
 2242|       |        // Help takes precedence
 2243|       |        let args = vec![
 2244|       |            "full_test".to_string(),
 2245|       |            "--quick".to_string(),
 2246|       |            "--help".to_string(),
 2247|       |        ];
 2248|       |        assert!(parse_options(&args).is_none());
 2249|       |    }
 2250|       |
 2251|       |    #[test]
 2252|       |    fn test_parse_options_skip_quality() {
 2253|       |        let args = vec!["full_test".to_string(), "--skip-quality".to_string()];
 2254|       |        let options = parse_options(&args).unwrap();

 2256|       |        assert!(!options.skip_coverage);

 2258|       |
 2259|       |    #[test]
 2260|       |    fn test_parse_options_skip_mermaid() {
 2261|       |        let args = vec!["full_test".to_string(), "--skip-mermaid".to_string()];
 2262|       |        let options = parse_options(&args).unwrap();
 2263|       |        assert!(options.skip_mermaid);
 2264|       |    }
 2265|       |
 2266|       |    // ── Test output parsing tests ───────────────────────────────────
 2267|       |
 2268|       |    #[test]
 2269|       |    fn test_parse_test_output_counts_statuses() {
 2270|       |        let stdout = "\
 2271|       |test alpha ... ok\n\
 2272|       |test beta ... FAILED\n\
 2273|       |test gamma ... ignored\n\
 2274|       |not a test line\n";
 2275|       |        let duration = Duration::from_millis(3);
 2276|       |
 2277|       |        let result = parse_test_output("tests", stdout, "", duration);
 2278|       |
 2279|       |        assert_eq!(result.mode, "tests");
 2280|       |        assert_eq!(result.total, 3);
 2281|       |        assert_eq!(result.passed, 1);
 2282|       |        assert_eq!(result.failed, 1);
 2283|       |        assert_eq!(result.skipped, 1);
 2284|       |        assert_eq!(result.tests.len(), 2);
 2285|       |        assert_eq!(result.tests[0].name, "alpha");
 2286|       |        assert!(result.tests[0].passed);
 2287|       |        assert_eq!(result.tests[1].name, "beta");
 2288|       |        assert!(!result.tests[1].passed);
 2289|       |    }
 2290|       |
 2291|       |    #[test]
 2292|       |    fn test_parse_test_output_from_stderr() {
 2293|       |        let stdout = "test alpha ... ok\n";
 2294|       |        let stderr = "note: running tests\ntest delta ... ok\n";
 2295|       |
 2296|       |        let results = parse_test_output("tests", stdout, stderr, Duration::from_secs(1));
 2297|       |
 2298|       |        assert_eq!(results.total, 2);
 2299|       |        assert_eq!(results.passed, 2);
 2300|       |        assert!(results.tests.iter().any(|t| t.name == "alpha" && t.passed));
 2301|       |        assert!(results.tests.iter().any(|t| t.name == "delta" && t.passed));
 2302|       |    }
 2303|       |
 2304|       |    #[test]
 2305|       |    fn test_parse_test_output_empty() {
 2306|       |        let results = parse_test_output("tests", "", "", Duration::ZERO);
 2307|       |        assert_eq!(results.total, 0);
 2308|       |        assert_eq!(results.passed, 0);
 2309|       |        assert_eq!(results.failed, 0);
 2310|       |        assert_eq!(results.skipped, 0);
 2311|       |    }
 2312|       |
 2313|       |    #[test]
 2314|       |    fn test_parse_test_output_ignored_with_reason() {
 2315|       |        // cargo test can emit "ignored, <reason>" instead of bare "ignored"
 2316|       |        let stdout =
 2317|       |            "test alpha ... ok\ntest beta ... ignored, env vars are global\ntest gamma ... ok\n";
 2318|       |        let results = parse_test_output("tests", stdout, "", Duration::ZERO);
 2319|       |        assert_eq!(results.passed, 2);
 2320|       |        assert_eq!(results.skipped, 1);
 2321|       |        assert_eq!(results.total, 3);
 2322|       |        assert_eq!(results.tests.len(), 2); // ignored not in tests vec
 2323|       |    }

 2346|       |    #[test]
 2347|       |    fn test_categorize_tests_groups_correctly() {
 2348|       |        let tests = vec![
 2349|       |            make_result("markdown_renderer::tests::test_heading", true),
 2350|       |            make_result("markdown_renderer::tests::test_paragraph", true),
 2351|       |            make_result("markdown_renderer::tests::test_code", false),
 2352|       |            make_result("app::tests::test_open", true),
 2353|       |            make_result("app::tests::test_close", false),
 2354|       |        ];
 2355|       |
 2356|       |        let categories = categorize_tests(&tests);
 2357|       |
 2358|       |        assert_eq!(categories.len(), 2);
 2359|       |
 2360|       |        // Failures first
 2361|       |        let first = &categories[0];
 2362|       |        assert!(first.failed > 0);
 2363|       |
 2364|       |        let mr_cat = categories
 2365|       |            .iter()
 2366|       |            .find(|c| c.name == "markdown_renderer::tests")
 2367|       |            .unwrap();
 2368|       |        assert_eq!(mr_cat.total, 3);
 2369|       |        assert_eq!(mr_cat.passed, 2);
 2370|       |        assert_eq!(mr_cat.failed, 1);
 2371|       |
 2372|       |        let app_cat = categories.iter().find(|c| c.name == "app::tests").unwrap();
 2373|       |        assert_eq!(app_cat.total, 2);
 2374|       |        assert_eq!(app_cat.passed, 1);
 2375|       |        assert_eq!(app_cat.failed, 1);
 2376|       |    }
 2377|       |

 2379|       |    fn test_categorize_tests_empty() {
 2380|       |        let categories = categorize_tests(&[]);
 2381|       |        assert!(categories.is_empty());
 2382|       |    }

 2474|       |    fn test_build_report_path_increments_on_collision() {
 2475|       |        let temp = tempfile::TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 2476|       |        let dir = temp.path().join("tests").join("results");
 2477|       |        std::fs::create_dir_all(&dir).unwrap();
 2478|       |
 2479|       |        // Create existing report
 2480|       |        std::fs::write(dir.join("2026.03.15 - full test report.html"), "r1").unwrap();
 2481|       |        std::fs::write(dir.join("2026.03.15 - full test report (2).html"), "r2").unwrap();
 2482|       |
 2483|       |        // Verify collision increment logic
 2484|       |        let three = dir.join("2026.03.15 - full test report (3).html");
 2485|       |        assert!(!three.exists());
 2486|       |    }

 2511|       |    // ── Image diff tests ────────────────────────────────────────────
 2512|       |
 2513|       |    #[test]
 2514|       |    fn test_diff_images_identical() {
 2515|       |        let img = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([128, 128, 128, 255]));
 2516|       |        let (diff_pixels, max_delta) = diff_images(&img, &img, 60);
 2517|       |        assert_eq!(diff_pixels, 0);
 2518|       |        assert_eq!(max_delta, 0);
 2519|       |    }
 2520|       |
 2521|       |    #[test]
 2522|       |    fn test_diff_images_within_tolerance() {
 2523|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([100, 100, 100, 255]));
 2524|       |        let b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([150, 100, 100, 255]));
 2525|       |        let (diff_pixels, max_delta) = diff_images(&a, &b, 60);
 2526|       |        assert_eq!(diff_pixels, 0); // delta=50 is within tolerance=60
 2527|       |        assert_eq!(max_delta, 50);
 2528|       |    }
 2529|       |
 2530|       |    #[test]
 2531|       |    fn test_diff_images_exceeds_tolerance() {
 2532|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([0, 0, 0, 255]));
 2533|       |        let b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([255, 255, 255, 255]));
 2534|       |        let (diff_pixels, max_delta) = diff_images(&a, &b, 60);
 2535|       |        assert_eq!(diff_pixels, 100); // all 10x10 pixels differ
 2536|       |        assert_eq!(max_delta, 255);
 2537|       |    }
 2538|       |
 2539|       |    #[test]
 2540|       |    fn test_diff_images_mixed() {
 2541|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(2, 2, image::Rgba([100, 100, 100, 255]));
 2542|       |        let mut b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(2, 2, image::Rgba([100, 100, 100, 255]));
 2543|       |        // Make one pixel different by more than tolerance
 2544|       |        b.put_pixel(0, 0, image::Rgba([200, 100, 100, 255]));
 2545|       |        let (diff_pixels, max_delta) = diff_images(&a, &b, 60);
 2546|       |        assert_eq!(diff_pixels, 1);
 2547|       |        assert_eq!(max_delta, 100);
 2548|       |    }
 2549|       |
 2550|       |    // ── Pad to common size tests ────────────────────────────────────
 2551|       |
 2552|       |    #[test]
 2553|       |    fn test_pad_to_common_size_same_dimensions() {
 2554|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([128, 128, 128, 255]));
 2555|       |        let b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 10, image::Rgba([64, 64, 64, 255]));
 2556|       |        let (pa, pb) = pad_to_common_size(&a, &b);
 2557|       |        assert_eq!(pa.dimensions(), (10, 10));
 2558|       |        assert_eq!(pb.dimensions(), (10, 10));
 2559|       |    }
 2560|       |
 2561|       |    #[test]
 2562|       |    fn test_pad_to_common_size_different_dimensions() {
 2563|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(10, 20, image::Rgba([128, 128, 128, 255]));
 2564|       |        let b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(20, 10, image::Rgba([64, 64, 64, 255]));
 2565|       |        let (pa, pb) = pad_to_common_size(&a, &b);
 2566|       |        assert_eq!(pa.dimensions(), (20, 20));
 2567|       |        assert_eq!(pb.dimensions(), (20, 20));
 2568|       |    }
 2569|       |
 2570|       |    #[test]
 2571|       |    fn test_pad_to_common_size_preserves_content() {
 2572|       |        let a = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(2, 2, image::Rgba([100, 100, 100, 255]));
 2573|       |        let b = image::RgbaImage::from_pixel(4, 4, image::Rgba([200, 200, 200, 255]));
 2574|       |        let (pa, _pb) = pad_to_common_size(&a, &b);
 2575|       |        assert_eq!(pa.dimensions(), (4, 4));
 2576|       |        // Center pixel of padded a should be original color
 2577|       |        assert_eq!(pa.get_pixel(1, 1).0, [100, 100, 100, 255]);
 2578|       |        // Corner should be white (padding)
 2579|       |        assert_eq!(pa.get_pixel(0, 0).0, [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 2580|       |    }

 2636|       |    // ── Run full test orchestration tests ───────────────────────────
 2637|       |
 2638|       |    #[test]
 2639|       |    fn test_run_full_test_calls_runner() {
 2640|       |        let options = FullTestOptions {
 2641|       |            quick: true,
 2642|       |            skip_quality: true,
 2643|       |            skip_coverage: true,
 2644|       |            skip_mermaid: true,
 2645|       |            skip_d2_visual: true,
 2646|       |            update_d2_references: false,
 2647|       |        };
 2648|       |        let mut calls = Vec::new();
 2649|       |        let runner = |include_ignored: bool| {
 2650|       |            calls.push(include_ignored);
 2651|       |            make_suite(1, 0, 0, vec![make_result("t", true)])
 2652|       |        };
 2653|       |
 2654|       |        let outcome = run_full_test(&options, runner, Local::now());
 2655|       |
 2656|       |        assert_eq!(calls, vec![false]); // quick mode = not include_ignored
 2657|       |        assert!(!outcome.any_failed);
 2658|       |    }
 2659|       |
 2660|       |    #[test]
 2661|       |    fn test_run_full_test_detects_test_failures() {
 2662|       |        let options = FullTestOptions {
 2663|       |            quick: true,
 2664|       |            skip_quality: true,
 2665|       |            skip_coverage: true,
 2666|       |            skip_mermaid: true,
 2667|       |            skip_d2_visual: true,
 2668|       |            update_d2_references: false,
 2669|       |        };
 2670|       |        let runner = |_include_ignored: bool| {
 2671|       |            make_suite(
 2672|       |                1,
 2673|       |                1,
 2674|       |                0,
 2675|       |                vec![make_result("t", true), make_result("f", false)],
 2676|       |            )
 2677|       |        };
 2678|       |
 2679|       |        let outcome = run_full_test(&options, runner, Local::now());
 2680|       |        assert!(outcome.any_failed);
 2681|       |    }
 2682|       |
 2683|       |    #[test]
 2684|       |    fn test_run_full_test_full_mode_includes_ignored() {
 2685|       |        let options = FullTestOptions {
 2686|       |            quick: false,
 2687|       |            skip_quality: true,
 2688|       |            skip_coverage: true,
 2689|       |            skip_mermaid: true,
 2690|       |            skip_d2_visual: true,
 2691|       |            update_d2_references: false,
 2692|       |        };
 2693|       |        let mut calls = Vec::new();
 2694|       |        let runner = |include_ignored: bool| {
 2695|       |            calls.push(include_ignored);
 2696|       |            make_suite(1, 0, 0, vec![make_result("t", true)])
 2697|       |        };
 2698|       |
 2699|       |        let _outcome = run_full_test(&options, runner, Local::now());
 2700|       |        assert_eq!(calls, vec![true]); // full mode = include_ignored
 2701|       |    }

 2703|       |    // ── HTML report tests ───────────────────────────────────────────
 2704|       |
 2705|       |    #[test]
 2706|       |    fn test_generate_html_report_basic_structure() {
 2707|       |        let tests = make_suite(
 2708|       |            2,
 2709|       |            1,
 2710|       |            0,
 2711|       |            vec![
 2712|       |                make_result("app::tests::test_a", true),
 2713|       |                make_result("app::tests::test_b", true),
 2714|       |                make_result("app::tests::test_c", false),
 2715|       |            ],
 2716|       |        );
 2717|       |
 2718|       |        let html = generate_html_report(
 2719|       |            Some(&tests),
 2720|       |            &[],
 2721|       |            None,
 2722|       |            None,
 2723|       |            None,
 2724|       |            "abc123 (main)",
 2725|       |            Local::now(),
 2726|       |            "Full Suite",
 2727|       |            Duration::from_secs(100),
 2728|       |        );
 2729|       |
 2730|       |        assert!(html.contains("<!DOCTYPE html>"));
 2731|       |        assert!(html.contains("mdmdview Full Test Report"));
 2732|       |        assert!(html.contains("abc123 (main)"));
 2733|       |        assert!(html.contains("Phase Summary"));
 2734|       |        assert!(html.contains("Test Breakdown"));
 2735|       |        assert!(html.contains("Failed Tests"));
 2736|       |        assert!(html.contains("test_c"));
