 3226|       |function __mdmdview_path_points(el) {
 3227|       |  var d = el && el.getAttribute ? el.getAttribute('d') : null;
 3228|       |  if (!d) { return []; }
 3229|       |  var nums = String(d).match(/-?\d*\.?\d+(?:e[-+]?\d+)?/ig);
 3230|       |  if (!nums || nums.length < 2) { return []; }
 3231|       |  var points = [];
 3232|       |  for (var i = 0; i + 1 < nums.length; i += 2) {
 3233|       |    var x = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i]);
 3234|       |    var y = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i + 1]);
 3235|       |    points.push(__mdmdview_transform_point(el, x, y));
 3236|       |  }
 3237|       |  return points;
 3238|       |}
 3239|       |function __mdmdview_path_total_length(el) {
 3240|       |  var points = __mdmdview_path_points(el);
 3241|       |  if (points.length < 2) { return 0; }
 3242|       |  var total = 0;
 3243|       |  for (var i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
 3244|       |    var dx = points[i].x - points[i - 1].x;
 3245|       |    var dy = points[i].y - points[i - 1].y;
 3246|       |    total += Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 3247|       |  }
 3248|       |  return total;
 3249|       |}
 3250|       |function __mdmdview_path_point_at_length(el, length) {
 3251|       |  var points = __mdmdview_path_points(el);
 3252|       |  if (!points.length) { return { x: 0, y: 0 }; }
 3253|       |  if (points.length === 1) { return points[0]; }
 3254|       |  var remaining = Math.max(0, __mdmdview_parse_num(length));
 3255|       |  for (var i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
 3256|       |    var p0 = points[i - 1];
 3257|       |    var p1 = points[i];
 3258|       |    var dx = p1.x - p0.x;
 3259|       |    var dy = p1.y - p0.y;
 3260|       |    var seg = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 3261|       |    if (seg <= 0) { continue; }
 3262|       |    if (remaining <= seg) {
 3263|       |      var t = remaining / seg;
 3264|       |      return { x: p0.x + dx * t, y: p0.y + dy * t };
 3265|       |    }
 3266|       |    remaining -= seg;
 3267|       |  }
 3268|       |  return points[points.length - 1];
 3269|       |}
 3270|       |function __mdmdview_text_metrics(el) {
 3271|       |  var size = __mdmdview_get_font_size(el);
 3272|       |  var weight = __mdmdview_get_font_weight(el);
 3273|       |  if (!el || !el.children || !el.children.length) {
 3274|       |    var raw = el ? __mdmdview_collect_text(el) : '';
 3275|       |    return __mdmdview_measure_text(raw, size, weight);
 3276|       |  }
 3277|       |  var max_w = 0;
 3278|       |  var max_h = 0;
 3279|       |  var lines = 0;
 3280|       |  for (var i = 0; i < el.children.length; i++) {
 3281|       |    var child = el.children[i];
 3282|       |    var tag = (child.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
 3283|       |    if (tag !== 'tspan') { continue; }
 3284|       |    var text = __mdmdview_collect_text(child);
 3285|       |    if (!text || !String(text).trim()) { continue; }
 3286|       |    var child_weight = __mdmdview_get_font_weight(child);
 3287|       |    var m = __mdmdview_measure_text(text, size, child_weight);
 3288|       |    if (m.width > max_w) { max_w = m.width; }
 3289|       |    if (m.height > max_h) { max_h = m.height; }
 3290|       |    lines += 1;
 3291|       |  }
 3292|       |  if (!lines) {
 3293|       |    var fallback = __mdmdview_collect_text(el);
 3294|       |    return __mdmdview_measure_text(fallback, size, weight);
 3295|       |  }
 3296|       |  var line_height = max_h > 0 ? max_h : size * 1.2;
 3297|       |  return { width: max_w, height: lines * line_height };
 3298|       |}
 3299|       |function __mdmdview_apply_matrix(bbox, a, b, c, d, e, f) {
 3300|       |  if (!bbox) { return bbox; }
 3301|       |  var x = bbox.x;
 3302|       |  var y = bbox.y;
 3303|       |  var w = bbox.width;
 3304|       |  var h = bbox.height;
 3305|       |  var pts = [
 3306|       |    [x, y],
 3307|       |    [x + w, y],
 3308|       |    [x, y + h],
 3309|       |    [x + w, y + h]
 3310|       |  ];
 3311|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 3312|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 3313|       |  var max_x = -Infinity;
 3314|       |  var max_y = -Infinity;
 3315|       |  for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
 3316|       |    var px = pts[i][0];
 3317|       |    var py = pts[i][1];
 3318|       |    var nx = a * px + c * py + e;
 3319|       |    var ny = b * px + d * py + f;
 3320|       |    if (nx < min_x) { min_x = nx; }
 3321|       |    if (ny < min_y) { min_y = ny; }
 3322|       |    if (nx > max_x) { max_x = nx; }
 3323|       |    if (ny > max_y) { max_y = ny; }
 3324|       |  }
 3325|       |  if (!isFinite(min_x) || !isFinite(min_y) || !isFinite(max_x) || !isFinite(max_y)) {
 3326|       |    return bbox;
 3327|       |  }
 3328|       |  return { x: min_x, y: min_y, width: max_x - min_x, height: max_y - min_y };
 3329|       |}
 3330|       |function __mdmdview_apply_transform(el, bbox) {
 3331|       |  if (!el || !bbox) { return bbox; }
 3332|       |  var transform = el.getAttribute ? el.getAttribute('transform') : null;
 3333|       |  if (!transform) { return bbox; }
 3334|       |  var current = bbox;
 3335|       |  var re = /([a-zA-Z]+)\(([^)]+)\)/g;
 3336|       |  var match = null;
 3337|       |  while ((match = re.exec(String(transform))) !== null) {
 3338|       |    var name = match[1].toLowerCase();
 3339|       |    var params = match[2].split(/[, ]+/).filter(function(p) { return p.length; });
 3340|       |    var nums = [];
 3341|       |    for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) {
 3342|       |      nums.push(__mdmdview_parse_num(params[i]));
 3343|       |    }
 3344|       |    if (name === 'translate') {
 3345|       |      var tx = nums.length ? nums[0] : 0;
 3346|       |      var ty = nums.length > 1 ? nums[1] : 0;
 3347|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, tx, ty);
 3348|       |    } else if (name === 'scale') {
 3349|       |      var sx = nums.length ? nums[0] : 1;
 3350|       |      var sy = nums.length > 1 ? nums[1] : sx;
 3351|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, sx, 0, 0, sy, 0, 0);
 3352|       |    } else if (name === 'matrix' && nums.length >= 6) {
 3353|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(
 3354|       |        current,
 3355|       |        nums[0],
 3356|       |        nums[1],
 3357|       |        nums[2],
 3358|       |        nums[3],
 3359|       |        nums[4],
 3360|       |        nums[5]
 3361|       |      );
 3362|       |    } else if (name === 'rotate' && nums.length) {
 3363|       |      var angle = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3364|       |      var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 3365|       |      var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 3366|       |      if (nums.length >= 3) {
 3367|       |        var cx = nums[1];
 3368|       |        var cy = nums[2];
 3369|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, -cx, -cy);
 3370|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, cos, sin, -sin, cos, 0, 0);
 3371|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, cx, cy);
 3372|       |      } else {
 3373|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, cos, sin, -sin, cos, 0, 0);
 3374|       |      }
 3375|       |    } else if (name === 'skewx' && nums.length) {
 3376|       |      var ax = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3377|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, Math.tan(ax), 1, 0, 0);
 3378|       |    } else if (name === 'skewy' && nums.length) {
 3379|       |      var ay = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3380|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, Math.tan(ay), 0, 1, 0, 0);
 3381|       |    }
 3382|       |  }
 3383|       |  return current;
 3384|       |}
 3385|       |function __mdmdview_children_bounds(el) {
 3386|       |  if (!el || !el.children || !el.children.length) { return null; }
 3387|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 3388|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 3389|       |  var max_x = -Infinity;
 3390|       |  var max_y = -Infinity;
 3391|       |  for (var i = 0; i < el.children.length; i++) {
 3392|       |    var child_box = __mdmdview_bbox(el.children[i]);
 3393|       |    if (!child_box) { continue; }
 3394|       |    if (!isFinite(child_box.width) || !isFinite(child_box.height)) { continue; }
 3395|       |    if (child_box.width <= 0 && child_box.height <= 0) { continue; }
 3396|       |    if (child_box.x < min_x) { min_x = child_box.x; }
 3397|       |    if (child_box.y < min_y) { min_y = child_box.y; }
 3398|       |    if (child_box.x + child_box.width > max_x) { max_x = child_box.x + child_box.width; }
 3399|       |    if (child_box.y + child_box.height > max_y) { max_y = child_box.y + child_box.height; }
 3400|       |  }
 3401|       |  if (isFinite(min_x) && isFinite(min_y) && isFinite(max_x) && isFinite(max_y)) {
 3402|       |    return { x: min_x, y: min_y, width: max_x - min_x, height: max_y - min_y };
 3403|       |  }
 3404|       |  return null;
 3405|       |}
 3406|       |function __mdmdview_cache_bbox(el, box) {

 3413|       |function __mdmdview_bbox(el) {
 3414|       |  if (!el) { return { x: 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0 }; }

 3531|       |    var min_y = Math.min(y1, y2);
 3532|       |    var max_x = Math.max(x1, x2);
 3533|       |    var max_y = Math.max(y1, y2);
 3534|       |    return __mdmdview_cache_bbox(
 3535|       |      el,
 3536|       |      __mdmdview_apply_transform(el, { x: min_x, y: min_y, width: max_x - min_x, height: max_y - min_y })
 3537|       |    );
 3538|       |  }
 3539|       |  if (tag === 'polygon' || tag === 'polyline') {
 3540|       |    var points = el.getAttribute('points');
 3541|       |    if (points) {
 3542|       |      var parts = String(points).trim().split(/[\s,]+/).filter(function(p) { return p.length; });
 3543|       |      if (parts.length >= 2) {
 3544|       |        var min_px = Infinity;
 3545|       |        var min_py = Infinity;
 3546|       |        var max_px = -Infinity;
 3547|       |        var max_py = -Infinity;
 3548|       |        for (var i = 0; i + 1 < parts.length; i += 2) {
 3549|       |          var px = __mdmdview_parse_num(parts[i]);
 3550|       |          var py = __mdmdview_parse_num(parts[i + 1]);
 3551|       |          if (px < min_px) { min_px = px; }
 3552|       |          if (py < min_py) { min_py = py; }
 3553|       |          if (px > max_px) { max_px = px; }
 3554|       |          if (py > max_py) { max_py = py; }
 3555|       |        }
 3556|       |        if (isFinite(min_px) && isFinite(min_py) && isFinite(max_px) && isFinite(max_py)) {
 3557|       |          return __mdmdview_cache_bbox(

 3578|       |        var max_py = -Infinity;
 3579|       |        for (var i = 0; i + 1 < nums.length; i += 2) {
 3580|       |          var px = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i]);
 3581|       |          var py = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i + 1]);
 3582|       |          if (px < min_px) { min_px = px; }
 3583|       |          if (py < min_py) { min_py = py; }
 3584|       |          if (px > max_px) { max_px = px; }
 3585|       |          if (py > max_py) { max_py = py; }
 3586|       |        }

 3647|       |function __mdmdview_escape_text(text) {

 3670|       |function __mdmdview_style_text(style) {

 3682|       |    parts.push(key + ':' + String(val));
 3683|       |  }

 3696|       |function __mdmdview_group_has_text(node) {

 3721|       |function __mdmdview_is_labelish(node) {
 3722|       |  if (!node || !node.tagName) { return false; }

 3729|       |  }

 3732|       |function __mdmdview_order_children(node) {
 3733|       |  if (!node || !node.children || !node.children.length) {
 3734|       |    return node && node.children ? node.children : [];
 3735|       |  }
 3736|       |  var tag = String(node.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
 3737|       |  if (tag !== 'g') { return node.children; }
 3738|       |  if (!__mdmdview_group_has_shape(node)) { return node.children; }
 3739|       |  var has_label = false;
 3740|       |  for (var i = 0; i < node.children.length; i++) {
 3741|       |    if (__mdmdview_is_labelish(node.children[i])) { has_label = true; break; }
 3742|       |  }
 3743|       |  if (!has_label) { return node.children; }
 3744|       |  var before = [];
 3745|       |  var after = [];
 3746|       |  for (var j = 0; j < node.children.length; j++) {
 3747|       |    var child = node.children[j];
 3748|       |    if (__mdmdview_is_labelish(child)) { after.push(child); }
 3749|       |    else { before.push(child); }
 3750|       |  }
 3751|       |  if (!before.length || !after.length) { return node.children; }
 3752|       |  return before.concat(after);

 3754|       |function __mdmdview_serialize_attrs(node) {
 3755|       |  var out = '';

 3757|       |  var has_style = false;
 3758|       |  for (var key in node.attributes) {
 3759|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(node.attributes, key)) { continue; }
 3760|       |    var val = node.attributes[key];

 3773|       |function __mdmdview_serialize(node) {
 3774|       |  if (!node) { return ''; }
 3775|       |  if (node.tagName === '#text') {
 3776|       |    return __mdmdview_escape_text(node.textContent || '');
 3777|       |  }
 3778|       |  var tag = node.tagName || '';
 3779|       |  var attrs = __mdmdview_serialize_attrs(node);
 3780|       |  var content = '';
 3781|       |  var lower = String(tag).toLowerCase();
 3782|       |  // Check if this is an xhtml element (e.g., div inside foreignObject)
 3783|       |  var isXhtml = node.namespaceURI && node.namespaceURI.indexOf('xhtml') >= 0;
 3784|       |  if (node.children && node.children.length) {
 3785|       |    if (lower === 'style' || lower === 'script') {
 3786|       |      content = __mdmdview_collect_text(node);
 3787|       |    } else {
 3788|       |      var ordered = __mdmdview_order_children(node);
 3789|       |      for (var i = 0; i < ordered.length; i++) {
 3790|       |        content += __mdmdview_serialize(ordered[i]);
 3791|       |      }
 3792|       |    }
 3793|       |  } else if (node.__rawInnerHTML && isXhtml) {
 3794|       |    // For xhtml elements with raw innerHTML, escape & but preserve HTML tags
 3795|       |    // Only escape & that aren't already part of entity references like &amp; &lt; etc.
 3796|       |    content = node.__rawInnerHTML.replace(/&(?!(amp|lt|gt|quot|apos|#\d+|#x[0-9a-fA-F]+);)/g, '&amp;');
 3797|       |  } else if (node.textContent) {
 3798|       |    if (lower === 'style' || lower === 'script') {
 3799|       |      content = node.textContent;
 3800|       |    } else {
 3801|       |      content = __mdmdview_escape_text(node.textContent);
 3802|       |    }
 3803|       |  }
 3804|       |  return '<' + tag + attrs + '>' + content + '</' + tag + '>';

 3824|       |function __mdmdview_detach(child) {
 3825|       |  if (!child || typeof child !== 'object') { return; }

 3827|       |  if (!parent || !parent.children) { return; }

 3829|       |  if (idx >= 0) {
 3830|       |    parent.children.splice(idx, 1);
 3831|       |    parent.childNodes = parent.children;
 3832|       |    parent.firstChild = parent.children[0] || null;
 3833|       |  }

 3836|       |function __mdmdview_parse_font_px(font) {

 3893|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_get_size(node) {

 3896|       |  var h = data && data.height !== undefined ? Number(data.height) : 40;
 3897|       |  if (!isFinite(w) || w <= 0) { w = 80; }
 3898|       |  if (!isFinite(h) || h <= 0) { h = 40; }

 3901|       |function __mdmdview_rect_intersection(hw, hh, ux, uy) {
 3902|       |  var ax = Math.abs(ux);
 3903|       |  var ay = Math.abs(uy);
 3904|       |  var dx = ax > 1e-6 ? hw / ax : Infinity;
 3905|       |  var dy = ay > 1e-6 ? hh / ay : Infinity;
 3906|       |  var dist = Math.min(dx, dy);
 3907|       |  if (!isFinite(dist) || dist <= 0) { dist = Math.max(hw, hh); }
 3908|       |  return dist;
 3909|       |}
 3910|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_collect(nodes, edges) {
 3911|       |  var node_map = {};
 3912|       |  var parents = {};
 3913|       |  var children = {};
 3914|       |  var root = null;
 3915|       |  var root_id = null;
 3916|       |  for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
 3917|       |    var node = nodes[i];
 3918|       |    if (!node || typeof node.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 3919|       |    var data = node.data();
 3920|       |    if (!data) { continue; }
 3921|       |    var id = data.id !== undefined ? String(data.id) : null;
 3922|       |    if (id === null) { continue; }
 3923|       |    node_map[id] = node;
 3924|       |  }
 3925|       |  for (var j = 0; j < edges.length; j++) {
 3926|       |    var edge = edges[j];
 3927|       |    if (!edge || typeof edge.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 3928|       |    var ed = edge.data();
 3929|       |    if (!ed) { continue; }
 3930|       |    var source = ed.source !== undefined ? String(ed.source) : null;
 3931|       |    var target = ed.target !== undefined ? String(ed.target) : null;
 3932|       |    if (!source || !target) { continue; }
 3933|       |    if (!children[source]) { children[source] = []; }
 3934|       |    children[source].push(target);
 3935|       |    parents[target] = source;
 3936|       |  }
 3937|       |  for (var key in node_map) {
 3938|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(node_map, key)) { continue; }
 3939|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(parents, key)) {
 3940|       |      root = node_map[key];
 3941|       |      root_id = key;
 3942|       |      break;
 3943|       |    }
 3944|       |  }
 3945|       |  if (!root && nodes.length) {
 3946|       |    root = nodes[0];
 3947|       |    if (root && typeof root.data === 'function') {
 3948|       |      var rd = root.data();
 3949|       |      if (rd && rd.id !== undefined) { root_id = String(rd.id); }
 3950|       |    }
 3951|       |  }
 3952|       |  return { node_map: node_map, children: children, parents: parents, root: root, root_id: root_id };
 3953|       |}
 3954|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree) {
 3955|       |  var kids = tree.children[node_id] || [];
 3956|       |  return kids.slice();
 3957|       |}
 3958|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_assign_sides(tree) {
 3959|       |  var sides = {};
 3960|       |  var root_id = tree.root_id;
 3961|       |  if (!root_id) { return sides; }
 3962|       |  sides[root_id] = 0;
 3963|       |  function assign(node_id) {
 3964|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 3965|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 3966|       |      var child_id = kids[i];
 3967|       |      var child_node = tree.node_map[child_id];
 3968|       |      var side = sides[node_id];
 3969|       |      if (node_id === root_id) {
 3970|       |        var data = child_node && typeof child_node.data === 'function' ? child_node.data() : null;

 3997|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_layout(nodes, edges) {
 3998|       |  var tree = __mdmdview_mindmap_collect(nodes, edges);
 3999|       |  if (!tree.root || !tree.root_id) { return; }
 4000|       |  var sizes = {};
 4001|       |  for (var key in tree.node_map) {
 4002|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(tree.node_map, key)) { continue; }
 4003|       |    sizes[key] = __mdmdview_mindmap_get_size(tree.node_map[key]);
 4004|       |  }
 4005|       |  var sides = __mdmdview_mindmap_assign_sides(tree);
 4006|       |  var pad = 10;
 4007|       |  var root_data = tree.root && typeof tree.root.data === 'function' ? tree.root.data() : null;
 4008|       |  if (root_data && root_data.padding !== undefined) {
 4009|       |    var p = Number(root_data.padding);
 4010|       |    if (isFinite(p) && p > 0) { pad = p; }
 4011|       |  }
 4012|       |  var gap_x = Math.max(24, pad * 2.2);
 4013|       |  var positions = {};
 4014|       |  positions[tree.root_id] = { x: 0, y: 0 };
 4015|       |  var angles = {};
 4016|       |  angles[tree.root_id] = 0;
 4017|       |  var deg = Math.PI / 180;
 4018|       |  var left_start = 245 * deg;
 4019|       |  var left_end = 122 * deg;
 4020|       |  var right_start = 345 * deg;
 4021|       |  var right_end = 353 * deg;
 4022|       |  function assign_even(children, start, end) {
 4023|       |    if (!children.length) { return; }
 4024|       |    if (children.length === 1) {
 4025|       |      angles[children[0]] = (start + end) / 2;
 4026|       |      return;
 4027|       |    }
 4028|       |    var span = end - start;
 4029|       |    var step = span / (children.length - 1);
 4030|       |    for (var i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
 4031|       |      angles[children[i]] = start + step * i;
 4032|       |    }
 4033|       |  }
 4034|       |  var root_kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(tree.root_id, tree);
 4035|       |  var left = [];
 4036|       |  var right = [];
 4037|       |  for (var rk = 0; rk < root_kids.length; rk++) {
 4038|       |    var kid = root_kids[rk];
 4039|       |    var side = sides[kid] || 1;
 4040|       |    if (side < 0) { left.push(kid); } else { right.push(kid); }
 4041|       |  }
 4042|       |  assign_even(left, left_start, left_end);
 4043|       |  assign_even(right, right_start, right_end);
 4044|       |  function spread_for_depth(depth, parent_angle) {
 4045|       |    var base = 38 * deg;
 4046|       |    var cos = Math.cos(parent_angle || 0);
 4047|       |    var bias = cos < 0 ? 1.4 : 1.0;
 4048|       |    var depth_factor = 1 + Math.max(0, depth - 1) * 0.2;
 4049|       |    return (base * bias) / depth_factor;
 4050|       |  }
 4051|       |  function assign_child_angles(node_id, depth) {
 4052|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 4053|       |    if (!kids.length) { return; }
 4054|       |    var parent_angle = angles[node_id] || 0;
 4055|       |    if (kids.length === 1) {
 4056|       |      var sin = Math.sin(parent_angle);
 4057|       |      var cos = Math.cos(parent_angle);
 4058|       |      var offset = 0;
 4059|       |      if (cos < -0.1 && sin < -0.1) { offset = 20 * deg; }
 4060|       |      angles[kids[0]] = parent_angle + offset;
 4061|       |      assign_child_angles(kids[0], depth + 1);
 4062|       |      return;
 4063|       |    }
 4064|       |    var spread = spread_for_depth(depth, parent_angle);
 4065|       |    var upper = 1.3;
 4066|       |    var lower = 0.9;
 4067|       |    var start = parent_angle - spread * upper;
 4068|       |    var end = parent_angle + spread * lower;
 4069|       |    assign_even(kids, start, end);
 4070|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 4071|       |      assign_child_angles(kids[i], depth + 1);

 4075|       |    assign_child_angles(root_kids[a], 1);

 4077|       |  function place_node(node_id, depth) {
 4078|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 4079|       |    if (!kids.length) { return; }
 4080|       |    var parent_pos = positions[node_id];
 4081|       |    var parent_size = sizes[node_id];
 4082|       |    var parent_radius = Math.max(parent_size.w, parent_size.h) / 2;
 4083|       |    var parent_angle = angles[node_id] || 0;
 4084|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 4085|       |      var child = kids[i];
 4086|       |      var angle = angles[child];
 4087|       |      if (angle === undefined) { angle = angles[node_id] || 0; }
 4088|       |      var child_size = sizes[child];
 4089|       |      var child_radius = Math.max(child_size.w, child_size.h) / 2;
 4090|       |      var dist = parent_radius + child_radius + gap_x;
 4091|       |      if (depth > 0) {
 4092|       |        dist *= 1.15;
 4093|       |      }
 4094|       |      var factor = 1;
 4095|       |      if (depth === 0) {
 4096|       |        var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 4097|       |        var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 4098|       |        factor *= 1.1 * (1 + 0.2 * cos + 0.1 * sin);
 4099|       |      } else {
 4100|       |        var diff = angle - parent_angle;
 4101|       |        while (diff > Math.PI) { diff -= Math.PI * 2; }
 4102|       |        while (diff < -Math.PI) { diff += Math.PI * 2; }
 4103|       |        var norm = diff / (Math.PI / 6);
 4104|       |        if (norm > 1) { norm = 1; }
 4105|       |        if (norm < -1) { norm = -1; }
 4106|       |        factor *= 1 + 0.12 * norm;
 4107|       |        factor *= 0.98 + depth * 0.04;
 4108|       |      }
 4109|       |      if (depth > 0) {
 4110|       |        var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 4111|       |        var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 4112|       |        if (sin >= 0) {
 4113|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.15 * sin;
 4114|       |        } else if (cos > 0) {
 4115|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.05 * sin;
 4116|       |        } else {
 4117|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.25 * sin;
 4118|       |        }
 4119|       |        if (sin < -0.2 && cos < 0) {
 4120|       |          factor *= 0.9;
 4121|       |        }
 4122|       |      }
 4123|       |      if (kids.length === 1) {
 4124|       |        factor *= 0.95;
 4125|       |      }
 4126|       |      dist = dist * factor;
 4127|       |      var cx = parent_pos.x + Math.cos(angle) * dist;
 4128|       |      var cy = parent_pos.y + Math.sin(angle) * dist;
 4129|       |      positions[child] = { x: cx, y: cy };
 4130|       |      place_node(child, depth + 1);
 4131|       |    }
 4132|       |  }
 4133|       |  place_node(tree.root_id, 0);
 4134|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 4135|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 4136|       |  for (var id in positions) {
 4137|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(positions, id)) { continue; }
 4138|       |    var pos = positions[id];

 4141|       |    var ly = pos.y - size.h / 2;
 4142|       |    if (lx < min_x) { min_x = lx; }
 4143|       |    if (ly < min_y) { min_y = ly; }
 4144|       |  }
 4145|       |  if (!isFinite(min_x)) { min_x = 0; }
 4146|       |  if (!isFinite(min_y)) { min_y = 0; }
 4147|       |  var dx = pad - min_x;
 4148|       |  var dy = pad - min_y;
 4149|       |  for (var nid in positions) {
 4150|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(positions, nid)) { continue; }
 4151|       |    positions[nid].x += dx;
 4152|       |    positions[nid].y += dy;
 4153|       |  }
 4154|       |  for (var n = 0; n < nodes.length; n++) {
 4155|       |    var node = nodes[n];
 4156|       |    if (!node || typeof node.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 4157|       |    var data = node.data();

 4159|       |    if (!id || !positions[id]) { continue; }

 4164|       |  }

 4166|       |    var edge = edges[e];

 4170|       |    var target = ed && ed.target !== undefined ? String(ed.target) : null;
 4171|       |    if (!source || !target) { continue; }

 4174|       |    if (!s_pos || !t_pos) { continue; }
 4175|       |    var s_size = sizes[source];
 4176|       |    var t_size = sizes[target];
 4177|       |    var dx = t_pos.x - s_pos.x;
 4178|       |    var dy = t_pos.y - s_pos.y;
 4179|       |    var len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 4180|       |    if (!isFinite(len) || len <= 0.001) { len = 1; }
 4181|       |    var ux = dx / len;
 4182|       |    var uy = dy / len;

 4184|       |    var t_radius = __mdmdview_rect_intersection(t_size.w / 2, t_size.h / 2, ux, uy);
 4185|       |    var overlap = -2;
 4186|       |    s_radius += overlap;
 4187|       |    t_radius += overlap;
 4188|       |    if (s_radius < 0) { s_radius = 0; }
 4189|       |    if (t_radius < 0) { t_radius = 0; }

 4191|       |    if (s_radius + t_radius > max_total) {

 4193|       |      s_radius *= scale;
 4194|       |      t_radius *= scale;
 4195|       |    }

 4208|       |        midX: mx,
 4209|       |        midY: my,

 4211|       |        endY: ey

 4213|       |    };

 4602|       |function __mdmdview_matches_simple(node, raw) {
 4603|       |  if (!node || !raw) { return false; }
 4604|       |  var attr = __mdmdview_parse_attr_selector(raw);
 4605|       |  if (attr) {

 4608|       |  }

 4611|       |    return node.id === id || __mdmdview_get_attr(node, 'id') === id;
 4612|       |  }
 4613|       |  if (raw[0] === '.') {
 4614|       |    return __mdmdview_has_class(node, raw.slice(1));
 4615|       |  }

 4621|       |      && (node.id === tagId || __mdmdview_get_attr(node, 'id') === tagId);
 4622|       |  }

 4628|       |  }

 4631|       |function __mdmdview_matches_selector(node, sel) {
 4632|       |  if (!node || !sel) { return false; }

 5345|       |      var out = values && values.length ? values[0] : null;
 5346|       |      if (typeof out === 'string') { return out; }
 5347|       |      if (out && out.svg) { return out.svg; }
 5348|       |      if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5349|       |      throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5350|       |    });
 5351|       |  }
 5352|       |  if (typeof renderResult === 'string') { return renderResult; }
 5353|       |  if (renderResult && renderResult.svg) { return renderResult.svg; }
 5354|       |  if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5355|       |  throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5356|       |})
 5357|       |"#;

 5366|       |    fn env_lock() -> std::sync::MutexGuard<'static, ()> {
 5367|       |        static ENV_LOCK: OnceLock<Mutex<()>> = OnceLock::new();
 5368|       |        ENV_LOCK
 5369|       |            .get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(()))
 5370|       |            .lock()
 5371|       |            .expect("env lock")
 5372|       |    }

 5483|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(2);

 5486|       |        cache.order.push_back(key.clone());

 5549|       |    fn test_lru_cache_insert_and_evict_type_variants() {
 5550|       |        let mut id_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5551|       |        id_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5552|       |        id_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5553|       |        id_cache.entries.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());
 5554|       |        id_cache.order.clear();
 5555|       |        id_cache.insert(4u64, "four".to_string());
 5556|       |        assert!(id_cache.evict_oldest());
 5557|       |        id_cache.order.clear();
 5558|       |        assert!(!id_cache.evict_oldest());
 5559|       |
 5560|       |        let mut string_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5561|       |        string_cache.insert("a".to_string(), "one".to_string());
 5562|       |        string_cache.insert("b".to_string(), "two".to_string());
 5563|       |        string_cache
 5564|       |            .entries
 5565|       |            .insert("c".to_string(), "three".to_string());
 5566|       |        string_cache.order.clear();
 5567|       |        string_cache.insert("d".to_string(), "four".to_string());
 5568|       |        assert!(string_cache.evict_oldest());
 5569|       |        string_cache.order.clear();
 5570|       |        assert!(!string_cache.evict_oldest());
 5571|       |
 5572|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5573|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5574|       |            "mermaid_evict_variant",
 5575|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5576|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5577|       |        );
 5578|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5579|       |            texture: tex,
 5580|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5581|       |        };
 5582|       |        let mut texture_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5583|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5584|       |        texture_cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5585|       |        texture_cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());

 5588|       |        assert!(texture_cache.evict_oldest());
 5589|       |        texture_cache.order.clear();
 5590|       |        assert!(!texture_cache.evict_oldest());
 5591|       |    }

 5613|       |    fn test_lru_cache_mermaid_type_variants() {
 5614|       |        let mut string_cache = LruCache::new(2);
 5615|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5616|       |        string_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5617|       |        assert_eq!(string_cache.get(&1), Some("one".to_string()));
 5618|       |        assert!(string_cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5619|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "uno".to_string());
 5620|       |        string_cache.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());
 5621|       |
 5622|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5623|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5624|       |            "mermaid_cache_test",
 5625|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5626|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5627|       |        );
 5628|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5629|       |            texture: tex,
 5630|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5631|       |        };
 5632|       |        let mut texture_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5633|       |        assert!(texture_cache.get(&"missing".to_string()).is_none());
 5634|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5635|       |        assert!(texture_cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5636|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5637|       |        texture_cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5638|       |        texture_cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5639|       |        texture_cache.order.clear();
 5640|       |        texture_cache.insert("d".to_string(), entry);
 5641|       |    }
 5642|       |
 5643|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5644|       |    #[test]
 5645|       |    fn test_svg_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5646|       |        // Test that SvgCache evicts based on size, not just count
 5647|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 100); // 10 entries max, 100 bytes max
 5648|       |
 5649|       |        // Insert small entries that fit within size limit
 5650|       |        cache.insert(1, "abc".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5651|       |        cache.insert(2, "def".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5652|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5653|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 6);
 5654|       |
 5655|       |        // Insert large entry that exceeds size limit - should evict oldest
 5656|       |        let large_svg = "x".repeat(95); // 95 bytes
 5657|       |        cache.insert(3, large_svg);
 5658|       |        // current=6, adding 95 -> 101 > 100, so evict entry 1 (oldest)
 5659|       |        // After evicting entry 1: current=3, 3+95=98 <= 100, so stop evicting
 5660|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none()); // Entry 1 was evicted
 5661|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some()); // Entry 2 still present (3+95=98 <= 100)
 5662|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5663|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 98); // 3 (entry 2) + 95 (entry 3)
 5664|       |
 5665|       |        // Now insert another large entry to force more eviction
 5666|       |        let another_large = "y".repeat(50); // 50 bytes
 5667|       |        cache.insert(4, another_large);
 5668|       |        // current=98, adding 50 -> 148 > 100, evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5669|       |        // After evicting 2: current=95, 95+50=145 > 100, evict entry 3
 5670|       |        // After evicting 3: current=0, 0+50=50 <= 100, insert
 5671|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none());
 5672|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5673|       |        assert!(cache.get(&4).is_some());
 5674|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 50);
 5675|       |    }
 5676|       |
 5677|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5678|       |    #[test]
 5679|       |    fn test_svg_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5680|       |        // Test that SvgCache still respects entry count limit
 5681|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000); // 2 entries max, 1000 bytes max
 5682|       |
 5683|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5684|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5685|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5686|       |
 5687|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict oldest (entry 1)
 5688|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5689|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5690|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some());
 5691|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5692|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5693|       |    }

 5696|       |    #[test]
 5697|       |    fn test_svg_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5698|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 1000);
 5699|       |
 5700|       |        cache.insert(1, "short".to_string()); // 5 bytes
 5701|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 5);
 5702|       |
 5703|       |        // Update with longer value
 5704|       |        cache.insert(1, "much longer string".to_string()); // 18 bytes
 5705|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5706|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 18);
 5707|       |
 5708|       |        // Update with shorter value
 5709|       |        cache.insert(1, "x".to_string()); // 1 byte
 5710|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1);
 5711|       |    }

 5713|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5714|       |    #[test]
 5715|       |    fn test_svg_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5716|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000);
 5717|       |
 5718|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5719|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5720|       |
 5721|       |        // Access entry 1 to move it to back of LRU order
 5722|       |        let _ = cache.get(&1);
 5723|       |
 5724|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5725|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5726|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some()); // Entry 1 survived because it was accessed
 5727|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none()); // Entry 2 was evicted
 5728|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5729|       |    }
 5730|       |
 5731|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5732|       |    #[test]
 5733|       |    fn test_texture_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5734|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5735|       |        // Create a small texture that's 10x10 = 100 pixels = 400 bytes
 5736|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5737|       |            "small",
 5738|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5739|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5740|       |        );
 5741|       |        // Create textures and set max_bytes to 1000 (enough for 2 textures but not 3)
 5742|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1000);
 5743|       |
 5744|       |        let entry1 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5745|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5746|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5747|       |        };
 5748|       |        let entry2 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5749|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5750|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5751|       |        };
 5752|       |        let entry3 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5753|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5754|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5755|       |        };
 5756|       |
 5757|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry1);
 5758|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5759|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5760|       |
 5761|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry2);
 5762|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5763|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5764|       |
 5765|       |        // This should evict "a" because total would exceed 1000 bytes
 5766|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry3);
 5767|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5768|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5769|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5770|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5771|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5772|       |    }
 5773|       |
 5774|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5775|       |    #[test]
 5776|       |    fn test_texture_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5777|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5778|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5779|       |            "count_test",
 5780|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5781|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5782|       |        );
 5783|       |        // Capacity 2, large byte limit (count-based eviction should trigger first)
 5784|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5785|       |
 5786|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5787|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5788|       |            size: [1, 1], // 4 bytes
 5789|       |        };
 5790|       |
 5791|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5792|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5793|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5794|       |
 5795|       |        // This should evict "a" because capacity is 2
 5796|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5797|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5798|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5799|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5800|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5801|       |    }
 5802|       |
 5803|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5804|       |    #[test]
 5805|       |    fn test_texture_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5806|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5807|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5808|       |            "update_test",
 5809|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([5, 5], Color32::WHITE),
 5810|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5811|       |        );
 5812|       |        let large_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5813|       |            "update_test_large",
 5814|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5815|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5816|       |        );
 5817|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 5818|       |
 5819|       |        let small_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5820|       |            texture: small_tex,
 5821|       |            size: [5, 5], // 100 bytes
 5822|       |        };
 5823|       |        let large_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5824|       |            texture: large_tex,
 5825|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5826|       |        };
 5827|       |
 5828|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), small_entry);
 5829|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 100);
 5830|       |
 5831|       |        // Update same key with larger entry
 5832|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), large_entry);
 5833|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5834|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5835|       |    }
 5836|       |
 5837|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5838|       |    #[test]
 5839|       |    fn test_texture_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5840|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5841|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5842|       |            "touch_test",
 5843|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5844|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5845|       |        );
 5846|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5847|       |
 5848|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5849|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5850|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5851|       |        };
 5852|       |
 5853|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5854|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5855|       |
 5856|       |        // Touch "a" by getting it
 5857|       |        let _ = cache.get(&"a".to_string());
 5858|       |
 5859|       |        // Now "c" should evict "b" (not "a") because "a" was touched more recently
 5860|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5861|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5862|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5863|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5864|       |    }
 5865|       |
 5866|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5867|       |    #[test]
 5868|       |    fn test_texture_cache_clear() {
 5869|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5870|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5871|       |            "clear_test",
 5872|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5873|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5874|       |        );
 5875|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 5876|       |
 5877|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5878|       |            texture: tex.clone(),
 5879|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5880|       |        };
 5881|       |
 5882|       |        // Insert multiple entries
 5883|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5884|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5885|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5886|       |
 5887|       |        // Verify cache has entries
 5888|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 3);
 5889|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1200); // 3 * 400 bytes
 5890|       |
 5891|       |        // Clear the cache
 5892|       |        cache.clear();
 5893|       |
 5894|       |        // Verify cache is now empty
 5895|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 0);
 5896|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 0);
 5897|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5898|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none());
 5899|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_none());
 5900|       |    }

 5902|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5903|       |    #[test]
 5904|       |    fn test_mermaid_renderer_cache_branches() {
 5905|       |        let renderer = MermaidRenderer::new();
 5906|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5907|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5908|       |            "mermaid_renderer_cache",
 5909|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5910|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5911|       |        );
 5912|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5913|       |            texture: tex,
 5914|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5915|       |        };
 5916|       |
 5917|       |        {
 5918|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut();
 5919|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 5920|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5921|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 5922|       |            cache.entries.insert("stale".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5923|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5924|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5925|       |        }
 5926|       |
 5927|       |        {
 5928|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut();
 5929|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5930|       |            cache.insert(1, "one".to_string());
 5931|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 5932|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "two".to_string());
 5933|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5934|       |            cache.insert(3, "three".to_string());
 5935|       |        }
 5936|       |
 5937|       |        {
 5938|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut();
 5939|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5940|       |            cache.insert(1, "err".to_string());
 5941|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 5942|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "err2".to_string());
 5943|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5944|       |            cache.insert(3, "err3".to_string());
 5945|       |        }
 5946|       |
 5947|       |        {
 5948|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_texture_errors.borrow_mut();
 5949|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 5950|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), "err".to_string());
 5951|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 5952|       |            cache
 5953|       |                .entries
 5954|       |                .insert("stale".to_string(), "err2".to_string());
 5955|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5956|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), "err3".to_string());
 5957|       |        }
 5958|       |    }

 5960|       |    #[test]
 5961|       |    fn test_mermaid_texture_key_changes_with_scale_and_bg() {
 5962|       |        let svg_key = 42;
 5963|       |        let width_bucket = 320;
 5964|       |        let scale_a = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 5965|       |        let scale_b = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.2);
 5966|       |        let bg_a = [255, 0, 0, 255];
 5967|       |        let bg_b = [0, 0, 0, 255];
 5968|       |
 5969|       |        let key_a = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_a);
 5970|       |        let key_b = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_b, bg_a);
 5971|       |        let key_c = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_b);
 5972|       |
 5973|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_b);
 5974|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_c);
 5975|       |    }

 5978|       |    fn test_mermaid_width_bucket_rounds_up() {
 5979|       |        let step = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_WIDTH_BUCKET_STEP;
 5980|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(1.0), step);
 5981|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(step as f32 + 0.1), step * 2);
 5982|       |    }

 5999|       |    #[test]
 6000|       |    fn test_should_allow_html_labels_always_false_for_usvg() {
 6001|       |        // HTML labels are disabled because usvg cannot render foreignObject.
 6002|       |        // All inputs should return false to force SVG text elements.
 6003|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6004|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<i>Voice</i>\"]"
 6005|       |        ));
 6006|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6007|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<b>Bold</b>\"]"
 6008|       |        ));
 6009|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6010|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<script>bad</script>\"]"
 6011|       |        ));
 6012|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6013|       |            "graph TD; A[\"plain text\"]"
 6014|       |        ));
 6015|       |    }

 6088|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6089|       |    #[test]
 6090|       |    fn test_mermaid_quickjs_render_smoke() {
 6091|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6092|       |
 6093|       |        let flow = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 6094|       |        let seq = "sequenceDiagram\nAlice->>Bob: Hello\nBob-->>Alice: Hi";
 6095|       |        let class = "classDiagram\nClass01 <|-- Class02\nClass01 : +int id\nClass02 : +String name";
 6096|       |        let er = "erDiagram\nCUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places\nORDER ||--|{ LINE_ITEM : contains\nCUSTOMER {\n  int id\n  string name\n}\nORDER {\n  int id\n  date created\n}\nLINE_ITEM {\n  int id\n  int qty\n}\n";
 6097|       |        let gantt = "gantt\ntitle Sample Gantt\ndateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD\nsection A\nTask 1 :a1, 2024-01-01, 5d\nTask 2 :after a1, 3d\nsection B\nTask 3 :b1, 2024-01-06, 4d\n";
 6098|       |        let viewport_width = 1200;
 6099|       |        let viewport_height = 900;
 6100|       |
 6101|       |        let flow_svg = worker
 6102|       |            .render_svg(
 6103|       |                hash_str(flow),
 6104|       |                flow,
 6105|       |                viewport_width,
 6106|       |                viewport_height,
 6107|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6108|       |            )
 6109|       |            .expect("flowchart render");
 6110|       |        let seq_svg = worker
 6111|       |            .render_svg(
 6112|       |                hash_str(seq),
 6113|       |                seq,
 6114|       |                viewport_width,
 6115|       |                viewport_height,
 6116|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6117|       |            )
 6118|       |            .expect("sequence render");
 6119|       |        let class_svg = worker
 6120|       |            .render_svg(
 6121|       |                hash_str(class),
 6122|       |                class,
 6123|       |                viewport_width,
 6124|       |                viewport_height,
 6125|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6126|       |            )
 6127|       |            .expect("class render");
 6128|       |        let er_svg = worker
 6129|       |            .render_svg(
 6130|       |                hash_str(er),
 6131|       |                er,
 6132|       |                viewport_width,
 6133|       |                viewport_height,
 6134|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6135|       |            )
 6136|       |            .expect("er render");
 6137|       |        let gantt_svg = worker
 6138|       |            .render_svg(
 6139|       |                hash_str(gantt),
 6140|       |                gantt,
 6141|       |                viewport_width,
 6142|       |                viewport_height,
 6143|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6144|       |            )
 6145|       |            .expect("gantt render");
 6146|       |
 6147|       |        assert!(flow_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6148|       |        assert!(seq_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6149|       |        assert!(class_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6150|       |        assert!(er_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6151|       |        assert!(gantt_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6152|       |
 6153|       |        let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(600.0);
 6154|       |        let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 6155|       |        let (rgba, w, h) = worker
 6156|       |            .rasterize_svg(
 6157|       |                &flow_svg,
 6158|       |                width_bucket,
 6159|       |                scale_bucket,
 6160|       |                MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6161|       |            )
 6162|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6163|       |        assert!(!rgba.is_empty());
 6164|       |        assert_eq!(rgba.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6165|       |        assert!(w > 0);
 6166|       |        assert!(h > 0);
 6167|       |        assert!(w <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6168|       |        assert!(h <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6169|       |    }

 6180|       |        let viewport_height = 900;

 6183|       |            .render_svg(
 6184|       |                hash_str(diagram),
 6185|       |                diagram,
 6186|       |                viewport_width,
 6187|       |                viewport_height,
 6188|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6189|       |            )
 6190|       |            .expect("diagram with html tags render");
 6191|       |
 6192|       |        assert!(svg.contains("<svg"));
 6193|       |        // Text should be in SVG text elements (htmlLabels disabled for usvg compatibility)
 6194|       |        assert!(svg.contains("hello"), "Label text 'hello' should be in SVG");
 6195|       |    }

 6241|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6242|       |
 6243|       |        // Ampersands in labels - must be escaped for valid SVG
 6244|       |        let diagram = r#"graph TD; A[SIP Parsing & Auth]-->B[Types & Errors]"#;
 6245|       |
 6246|       |        let viewport_width = 1200;
 6247|       |        let viewport_height = 900;
 6248|       |
 6249|       |        let svg = worker
 6250|       |            .render_svg(
 6251|       |                hash_str(diagram),
 6252|       |                diagram,
 6253|       |                viewport_width,
 6254|       |                viewport_height,
 6255|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6256|       |            )
 6257|       |            .expect("ampersand in labels render");
 6258|       |
 6259|       |        assert!(svg.contains("<svg"));
 6260|       |        // Ampersands should be escaped for valid XML/SVG
 6261|       |        assert!(
 6262|       |            svg.contains("&amp;") || svg.contains("Parsing"),
 6263|       |            "Label text should be in SVG"
 6264|       |        );

 6267|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6268|       |    #[test]
 6269|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_matches_thread() {
 6270|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6271|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6272|       |        {
 6273|       |            let _guard = MermaidJsEmptyGuard::set(true);
 6274|       |            assert!(mermaid_js_empty());
 6275|       |        }
 6276|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6277|       |    }
 6278|       |
 6279|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6280|       |    #[test]
 6281|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_mismatch_thread() {
 6282|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6283|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true));
 6284|       |        let _ = handle.join();
 6285|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6286|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6287|       |    }
 6288|       |
 6289|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6290|       |    #[test]
 6291|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_false_clears() {
 6292|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6293|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true);
 6294|       |        let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6295|       |        assert!(previous.is_some());
 6296|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6297|       |    }

 6302|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6303|       |        let guard = MERMAID_JS_EMPTY_OVERRIDE.try_lock().expect("override lock");
 6304|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6305|       |        drop(guard);
 6306|       |    }

 6320|       |    #[test]
 6321|       |    fn test_measure_text_native_handles_optional_weight() {
 6322|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6323|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6324|       |        worker.engine.ctx.with(|ctx| {
 6325|       |            let with_weight: Vec<f64> = ctx
 6326|       |                .eval("__mdmdview_measure_text_native('abc', 12, 700)")
 6327|       |                .expect("with weight");
 6328|       |            let without_weight: Vec<f64> = ctx
 6329|       |                .eval("__mdmdview_measure_text_native('abc', 12, undefined)")
 6330|       |                .expect("without weight");
 6331|       |            assert_eq!(with_weight.len(), 2);
 6332|       |            assert_eq!(without_weight.len(), 2);
 6333|       |        });
 6334|       |    }

 6336|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6337|       |    #[test]
 6338|       |    fn test_map_init_result_variants() {
 6339|       |        // Tests the inlined init-error mapping pattern used in MermaidWorker::new
 6340|       |        let ok: Result<(), String> = Ok(());
 6341|       |        assert!(ok
 6342|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6343|       |            .is_ok());
 6344|       |        let err: Result<(), String> = Err("oops".to_string());
 6345|       |        let msg = err
 6346|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6347|       |            .unwrap_err();
 6348|       |        assert!(msg.contains("Mermaid init error: oops"));
 6349|       |    }

 6352|       |    #[test]
 6353|       |    fn test_format_render_result_variants() {
 6354|       |        let ok = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Ok("<svg></svg>".to_string()), 10, 5)
 6355|       |            .expect("ok result");
 6356|       |        assert!(ok.contains("<svg"));
 6357|       |
 6358|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("boom".to_string()), 10, 5).unwrap_err();
 6359|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid render error: boom"));
 6360|       |
 6361|       |        let timeout =
 6362|       |            MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("late".to_string()), 10, 20).unwrap_err();
 6363|       |        assert_eq!(timeout, "Mermaid render timed out");
 6364|       |    }

 6369|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6370|       |
 6371|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6372|       |            svg_key: 1,
 6373|       |            texture_key: "missing".to_string(),
 6374|       |            code: None,
 6375|       |            svg: None,
 6376|       |            width_bucket: 100,
 6377|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6378|       |            viewport_width: 100,
 6379|       |            viewport_height: 100,
 6380|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6381|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6382|       |        };
 6383|       |
 6384|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6385|       |        assert!(result.svg.is_none());
 6386|       |        assert!(result.rgba.is_none());
 6387|       |        assert!(result.error.is_some());
 6388|       |    }

 6411|       |        let (data, w, h) = worker
 6412|       |            .rasterize_svg(

 6542|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6543|       |    #[test]
 6544|       |    fn test_bbox_validation_helpers() {
 6545|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6546|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(0.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6547|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6548|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(f32::NAN, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6549|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, f32::INFINITY, 0.0, 0.0));
 6550|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, f32::NAN, 0.0));
 6551|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(
 6552|       |            10.0,
 6553|       |            10.0,
 6554|       |            0.0,
 6555|       |            f32::INFINITY
 6556|       |        ));
 6557|       |    }

 6560|       |    #[test]
 6561|       |    fn test_should_resize_bbox_variants() {
 6562|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6563|       |            true, true, 1.0, 1.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6564|       |        ));
 6565|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6566|       |            true, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6567|       |        ));
 6568|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6569|       |            false, true, 20.0, 5.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6570|       |        ));
 6571|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6572|       |            false, true, 11.0, 11.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6573|       |        ));
 6574|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6575|       |            false, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6576|       |        ));
 6577|       |    }

 6681|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6682|       |    #[test]
 6683|       |    fn test_rasterize_svg_applies_background_fill() {
 6684|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6685|       |
 6686|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="4" height="4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg>"#;
 6687|       |        let bg = [10, 20, 30, 200];
 6688|       |        let (data, w, h) = worker
 6689|       |            .rasterize_svg(svg, 0, MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0), bg)
 6690|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6691|       |        assert_eq!((w, h), (4, 4));
 6692|       |        assert_eq!(data.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6693|       |        let alpha = 200.0_f32 / 255.0;
 6694|       |        let expected_r = (10.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6695|       |        let expected_g = (20.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6696|       |        let expected_b = (30.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6697|       |        assert_eq!(data[0], expected_r);
 6698|       |        assert_eq!(data[1], expected_g);
 6699|       |        assert_eq!(data[2], expected_b);
 6700|       |        assert_eq!(data[3], 200);
 6701|       |    }

 6703|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6704|       |    #[test]
 6705|       |    fn test_process_job_applies_svg_fixups() {
 6706|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6707|       |
 6708|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="120" height="120" viewBox="0 0 120 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 6709|       |<switch>
 6710|       |  <foreignObject><div>Plan</div></foreignObject>
 6711|       |  <text class="journey-section section-type-0" x="10">Plan</text>
 6712|       |</switch>
 6713|       |<g id="state-root_end-0">
 6714|       |  <circle class="state-end" r="5" width="10" height="10"></circle>
 6715|       |  <circle class="state-start" r="7" width="14" height="14"></circle>
 6716|       |</g>
 6717|       |<rect class="er attributeBoxOdd"></rect>
 6718|       |</svg>"#;
 6719|       |
 6720|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6721|       |            svg_key: 4,
 6722|       |            texture_key: "fixups".to_string(),
 6723|       |            code: None,
 6724|       |            svg: Some(svg.to_string()),
 6725|       |            width_bucket: 0,
 6726|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6727|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 6728|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 6729|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6730|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6731|       |        };
 6732|       |
 6733|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6734|       |        let rendered = result.svg.expect("svg output");
 6735|       |        assert!(!rendered.contains("<switch"));
 6736|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("fill:"));
 6737|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("end-state-inner"));
 6738|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("attributeBoxOdd"));
 6739|       |    }
 6740|       |
 6741|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6742|       |    #[test]
 6743|       |    fn test_poll_mermaid_results_handles_variants() {
 6744|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 6745|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 6746|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6747|       |
 6748|       |        renderer
 6749|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6750|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6751|       |            .insert("k1".to_string());
 6752|       |        result_tx
 6753|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6754|       |                svg_key: 1,
 6755|       |                texture_key: "k1".to_string(),
 6756|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6757|       |                rgba: None,
 6758|       |                size: None,
 6759|       |                error: None,
 6760|       |            })
 6761|       |            .expect("send svg");
 6762|       |        assert!(renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx));
 6763|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&1).is_some());
 6764|       |
 6765|       |        renderer
 6766|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6767|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6768|       |            .insert("k2".to_string());
 6769|       |        result_tx
 6770|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6771|       |                svg_key: 2,
 6772|       |                texture_key: "k2".to_string(),
 6773|       |                svg: None,
 6774|       |                rgba: Some(vec![0, 0, 0, 0]),
 6775|       |                size: None,
 6776|       |                error: None,
 6777|       |            })
 6778|       |            .expect("send rgba missing size");
 6779|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6780|       |        assert!(renderer
 6781|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6782|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6783|       |            .get(&"k2".to_string())
 6784|       |            .is_some());
 6785|       |
 6786|       |        renderer
 6787|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6788|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6789|       |            .insert("k3".to_string());
 6790|       |        result_tx
 6791|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6792|       |                svg_key: 3,
 6793|       |                texture_key: "k3".to_string(),
 6794|       |                svg: None,
 6795|       |                rgba: None,
 6796|       |                size: None,
 6797|       |                error: Some("boom".to_string()),
 6798|       |            })
 6799|       |            .expect("send error");
 6800|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6801|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&3).is_some());
 6802|       |
 6803|       |        renderer
 6804|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6805|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6806|       |            .insert("k4".to_string());
 6807|       |        result_tx
 6808|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6809|       |                svg_key: 4,
 6810|       |                texture_key: "k4".to_string(),
 6811|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6812|       |                rgba: None,
 6813|       |                size: None,
 6814|       |                error: Some("oops".to_string()),
 6815|       |            })
 6816|       |            .expect("send texture error");
 6817|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6818|       |        assert!(renderer
 6819|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6820|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6821|       |            .get(&"k4".to_string())
 6822|       |            .is_some());
 6823|       |
 6824|       |        renderer
 6825|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6826|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6827|       |            .insert("k5".to_string());
 6828|       |        result_tx
 6829|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6830|       |                svg_key: 5,
 6831|       |                texture_key: "k5".to_string(),
 6832|       |                svg: None,
 6833|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 6834|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 6835|       |                error: None,
 6836|       |            })
 6837|       |            .expect("send rgba with size");
 6838|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6839|       |        assert!(renderer
 6840|       |            .mermaid_textures
 6841|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6842|       |            .get(&"k5".to_string())
 6843|       |            .is_some());
 6844|       |    }
