 6846|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6847|       |    #[test]
 6848|       |    fn test_format_js_error_variants() {
 6849|       |        let rt = rquickjs::Runtime::new().expect("runtime");
 6850|       |        let ctx = rquickjs::Context::full(&rt).expect("context");
 6851|       |        ctx.with(|ctx| {
 6852|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw new Error('boom')").unwrap_err();
 6853|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6854|       |            assert!(msg.contains("boom"));
 6855|       |
 6856|       |            let err = ctx
 6857|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('match'); e.stack = 'match\\nstack'; throw e;")
 6858|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6859|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6860|       |            assert!(msg.contains("match"));
 6861|       |
 6862|       |            let err = ctx
 6863|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('note'); e.stack = 'stack only'; throw e;")
 6864|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6865|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6866|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6867|       |
 6868|       |            let err = ctx
 6869|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('blank'); e.stack = ' '; throw e;")
 6870|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6871|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6872|       |            assert!(msg.contains("blank"));
 6873|       |
 6874|       |            let err = ctx
 6875|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ stack: 'stack-only-obj' })")
 6876|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6877|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6878|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6879|       |
 6880|       |            let err = ctx
 6881|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ message: 'message-only-obj' })")
 6882|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6883|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6884|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6885|       |
 6886|       |            let err = ctx
 6887|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = undefined; e.stack = 'stack-only'; throw e;")
 6888|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6889|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6890|       |            assert!(msg.contains("stack-only"));
 6891|       |
 6892|       |            let err = ctx
 6893|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo'); delete e.stack; throw e;")
 6894|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6895|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6896|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo"));
 6897|       |
 6898|       |            let err = ctx
 6899|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo2'); e.stack = undefined; throw e;")
 6900|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6901|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6902|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo2"));
 6903|       |
 6904|       |            let err = ctx
 6905|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('zap'); e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 6906|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6907|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6908|       |            assert!(msg.contains("zap"));
 6909|       |
 6910|       |            let err = ctx
 6911|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = ''; e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 6912|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6913|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6914|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6915|       |
 6916|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 'stringy'").unwrap_err();
 6917|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6918|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "stringy");
 6919|       |
 6920|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 42").unwrap_err();
 6921|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6922|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "42");
 6923|       |
 6924|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 3.5").unwrap_err();
 6925|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6926|       |            assert!(msg.contains("3.5"));
 6927|       |
 6928|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw true").unwrap_err();
 6929|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6930|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "true");
 6931|       |
 6932|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, rquickjs::Error::Unknown);
 6933|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6934|       |
 6935|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw ({})").unwrap_err();
 6936|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6937|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6938|       |        });
 6939|       |    }
 6940|       |
 6941|       |    struct EnvGuard {
 6942|       |        key: &'static str,
 6943|       |        original: Option<String>,
 6944|       |    }
 6945|       |
 6946|       |    impl EnvGuard {
 6947|       |        fn set(key: &'static str, value: &str) -> Self {
 6948|       |            let original = std::env::var(key).ok();
 6949|       |            std::env::set_var(key, value);
 6950|       |            Self { key, original }
 6951|       |        }
 6952|       |    }
 6953|       |
 6954|       |    impl Drop for EnvGuard {
 6955|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 6956|       |            if let Some(value) = &self.original {
 6957|       |                std::env::set_var(self.key, value);
 6958|       |            } else {
 6959|       |                std::env::remove_var(self.key);
 6960|       |            }
 6961|       |        }
 6962|       |    }
 6963|       |
 6964|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6965|       |    struct MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 6966|       |        previous: Option<std::thread::ThreadId>,
 6967|       |    }
 6968|       |
 6969|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6970|       |    impl MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 6971|       |        fn set(value: bool) -> Self {
 6972|       |            let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(value);
 6973|       |            Self { previous }
 6974|       |        }
 6975|       |    }
 6976|       |
 6977|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6978|       |    impl Drop for MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 6979|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 6980|       |            let mut guard = MERMAID_JS_EMPTY_OVERRIDE
 6981|       |                .lock()
 6982|       |                .expect("mermaid js override lock");
 6983|       |            *guard = self.previous;
 6984|       |        }
 6985|       |    }
 6986|       |
 6987|       |    #[test]
 6988|       |    fn test_parse_hex_color() {
 6989|       |        assert_eq!(
 6990|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("#ff00ff"),
 6991|       |            Some([255, 0, 255, 255])
 6992|       |        );
 6993|       |        assert_eq!(
 6994|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("11223344"),
 6995|       |            Some([17, 34, 51, 68])
 6996|       |        );
 6997|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("bad").is_none());
 6998|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG0000").is_none());
 6999|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG00").is_none());
 7000|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG").is_none());
 7001|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG000000").is_none());
 7002|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG0000").is_none());
 7003|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG00").is_none());
 7004|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("000000GG").is_none());
 7005|       |    }

 7007|       |    #[test]
 7008|       |    fn test_env_guard_restores_original_value() {
 7009|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7010|       |        std::env::set_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "before");
 7011|       |        {
 7012|       |            let _guard = EnvGuard::set("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "after");
 7013|       |            assert_eq!(
 7014|       |                std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7015|       |                Some("after")
 7016|       |            );
 7017|       |        }
 7018|       |        assert_eq!(
 7019|       |            std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7020|       |            Some("before")
 7021|       |        );
 7022|       |        std::env::remove_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV");
 7023|       |    }

 7025|       |    #[test]
 7026|       |    fn test_mermaid_bg_key_and_scale_bucket() {
 7027|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([1, 2, 3, 4]), "01020304");
 7028|       |        assert_eq!(
 7029|       |            MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([255, 255, 255, 255]),
 7030|       |            "ffffffff"
 7031|       |        );
 7032|       |
 7033|       |        let factor = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_SCALE_BUCKET_FACTOR;
 7034|       |        assert_eq!(
 7035|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(0.1),
 7036|       |            (0.5 * factor).round() as u32
 7037|       |        );
 7038|       |        assert_eq!(
 7039|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(10.0),
 7040|       |            (4.0 * factor).round() as u32
 7041|       |        );
 7042|       |    }

 7045|       |    fn test_mermaid_hash_str_stable_and_distinct() {
 7046|       |        let a = hash_str("alpha");
 7047|       |        let b = hash_str("alpha");
 7048|       |        let c = hash_str("beta");
 7049|       |        assert_eq!(a, b);
 7050|       |        assert_ne!(a, c);
 7051|       |    }

 7144|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7145|       |    #[test]
 7146|       |    fn test_render_block_uses_cached_texture_scales() {
 7147|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7148|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 7149|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7150|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7151|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7152|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7153|       |        let mut rendered_large = false;
 7154|       |        let mut rendered_small = false;
 7155|       |
 7156|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7157|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7158|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 7159|       |                let texture =
 7160|       |                    ui.ctx()
 7161|       |                        .load_texture("mermaid-test", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 7162|       |                let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7163|       |                let make_key = |ui: &egui::Ui| {
 7164|       |                    let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());
 7165|       |                    let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 7166|       |                    let bg = theme.bg_fill();
 7167|       |                    MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_bucket, bg)
 7168|       |                };
 7169|       |
 7170|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7171|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7172|       |                    texture_key.clone(),
 7173|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7174|       |                        texture: texture.clone(),
 7175|       |                        size: [400, 200],
 7176|       |                    },
 7177|       |                );
 7178|       |                rendered_large = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7179|       |
 7180|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7181|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7182|       |                    texture_key,
 7183|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7184|       |                        texture,
 7185|       |                        size: [20, 10],
 7186|       |                    },
 7187|       |                );
 7188|       |                rendered_small = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7189|       |            });
 7190|       |        });
 7191|       |
 7192|       |        assert!(rendered_large);
 7193|       |        assert!(rendered_small);
 7194|       |    }

 7198|       |    fn test_render_block_reports_cached_error() {
 7199|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7200|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 7201|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7202|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7203|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7204|       |        renderer
 7205|       |            .mermaid_errors
 7206|       |            .borrow_mut()
 7207|       |            .insert(svg_key, "boom".to_string());
 7208|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7209|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7210|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7211|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7212|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7213|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);

 7218|       |
 7219|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7220|       |    #[test]
 7221|       |    fn test_render_block_queue_full_sets_waiting() {
 7222|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7223|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7224|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7225|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 7226|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7227|       |            svg_key: 1,
 7228|       |            texture_key: "full".to_string(),
 7229|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7230|       |            svg: None,
 7231|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 7232|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 7233|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7234|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7235|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 7236|       |            theme,
 7237|       |        };
 7238|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("fill queue");
 7239|       |
 7240|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7241|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7242|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7243|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7244|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7245|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, "graph TD; A-->B;", 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7246|       |            });
 7247|       |        });
 7248|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7249|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_frame_pending.get());
 7250|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7251|       |    }
 7252|       |

 7255|       |    fn test_render_block_disconnected_queue_sets_error() {
 7256|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7257|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7258|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 7259|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7260|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7261|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7262|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7263|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7264|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7265|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7266|       |            });
 7267|       |        });
 7268|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7269|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7270|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key).is_some());
 7271|       |    }

 7274|       |    #[test]
 7275|       |    fn test_render_block_pending_and_width_fallback() {
 7276|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7277|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(2);
 7278|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(2);
 7279|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7280|       |        result_tx
 7281|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 7282|       |                svg_key: 99,
 7283|       |                texture_key: "other".to_string(),
 7284|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 7285|       |                rgba: None,
 7286|       |                size: None,
 7287|       |                error: None,
 7288|       |            })
 7289|       |            .expect("send svg");
 7290|       |
 7291|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7292|       |        let input = test_raw_input(200.0, 120.0);
 7293|       |        let code = "timeline\n  title Demo";
 7294|       |        let mut rendered_first = false;
 7295|       |        let mut rendered_second = false;
 7296|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7297|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7298|       |                let rect = egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(10.0, 80.0));
 7299|       |                ui.allocate_ui_at_rect(rect, |ui| {
 7300|       |                    rendered_first = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7301|       |                    rendered_second = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7302|       |                });
 7303|       |            });
 7304|       |        });
 7305|       |        assert!(rendered_first);
 7306|       |        assert!(rendered_second);
 7307|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7308|       |    }

 7310|       |    #[test]
 7311|       |    fn test_mermaid_cache_insert_existing_key_and_empty_order() {
 7312|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(1);
 7313|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "one".to_string());
 7314|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "uno".to_string());
 7315|       |        assert_eq!(cache.get(&1), Some("uno".to_string()));
 7316|       |        assert!(cache.get(&9).is_none());
 7317|       |
 7318|       |        cache.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7319|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 7320|       |
 7321|       |        cache.entries.clear();
 7322|       |        cache.entries.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7323|       |        cache.order.clear();
 7324|       |        cache.insert(3u8, "three".to_string());
 7325|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 7326|       |    }

 7585|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7586|       |    #[test]
 7587|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_applies_expected_replacements() {
 7588|       |        let js = concat!(
 7589|       |            "var hD=wRe();",
 7590|       |            "FY.prototype={constructor:FY,appendChild:function(i){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,this._next)},insertBefore:function(i,s){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,s)},querySelector:function(i){return this._parent.querySelector(i)},querySelectorAll:function(i){return this._parent.querySelectorAll(i)}};",
 7591|       |            "function FY(i,s){this.ownerDocument=i.ownerDocument,this.namespaceURI=i.namespaceURI,this._next=null,this._parent=i,this.__data__=s}",
 7592|       |            "u.text().split(/(\\s+|<br>)/).reverse()",
 7593|       |            "p=fWe({container:document.getElementById(\"cy\"),style:[{selector:\"edge\",style:{\"curve-style\":\"bezier\"}}]});",
 7594|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run(),p.ready(v=>{Xe.info(\"Ready\",v),u(p)})",
 7595|       |            "const se=_.node().getBBox();"
 7596|       |        );
 7597|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7598|       |        assert!(output.contains("sanitize:function"));
 7599|       |        assert!(output.contains("document.body"));
 7600|       |        assert!(output.contains("String(typeof u.text"));
 7601|       |        assert!(output.contains("__mdmdview_cytoscape_stub"));
 7602|       |        assert!(output.contains("breadthfirst"));
 7603|       |        assert!(output.contains("se.width=Math.max"));
 7604|       |    }
 7605|       |
 7606|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7607|       |    #[test]
 7608|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_applies_mindmap_layout_fallback() {
 7609|       |        let js =
 7610|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run()";
 7611|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7612|       |        assert!(output.contains("breadthfirst"));
 7613|       |    }
 7614|       |
 7615|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7616|       |    #[test]

 7625|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_all_targets() {
 7626|       |        let js = concat!(
 7627|       |            "var hD=wRe();",
 7628|       |            "FY.prototype={constructor:FY,appendChild:function(i){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,this._next)},insertBefore:function(i,s){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,s)},querySelector:function(i){return this._parent.querySelector(i)},querySelectorAll:function(i){return this._parent.querySelectorAll(i)}};",
 7629|       |            "function FY(i,s){this.ownerDocument=i.ownerDocument,this.namespaceURI=i.namespaceURI,this._next=null,this._parent=i,this.__data__=s}",
 7630|       |            "u.text().split(/(\\s+|<br>)/).reverse()",
 7631|       |            "p=fWe({container:document.getElementById(\"cy\"),style:[{selector:\"edge\",style:{\"curve-style\":\"bezier\"}}]});",
 7632|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run(),p.ready(v=>{Xe.info(\"Ready\",v),u(p)})",
 7633|       |            "const se=_.node().getBBox();"
 7634|       |        );
 7635|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7636|       |        assert!(output.contains("sanitize:function"));
 7637|       |        assert!(output.contains("__mdmdview_cytoscape_stub"));
 7638|       |    }

 7682|       |    #[test]
 7683|       |    fn test_replace_and_upsert_attr_paths() {
 7684|       |        let tag = r#"<svg width="10" height="20">"#;
 7685|       |        let replaced = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "width", "99");
 7686|       |        assert!(replaced.contains("width=\"99\""));
 7687|       |        let unchanged = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7688|       |        assert_eq!(unchanged, tag);
 7689|       |        let upsert_existing = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "height", "42");
 7690|       |        assert!(upsert_existing.contains("height=\"42\""));
 7691|       |        let upsert_new = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7692|       |        assert!(upsert_new.contains("viewBox=\"0 0 1 1\""));
 7693|       |    }

 7745|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7746|       |    #[test]
 7747|       |    fn test_parse_viewbox_dims_and_format_dim() {
 7748|       |        assert_eq!(
 7749|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 100 200"),
 7750|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7751|       |        );
 7752|       |        assert_eq!(
 7753|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,200"),
 7754|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7755|       |        );
 7756|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,0").is_none());
 7757|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 -1 2").is_none());
 7758|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 NaN 2").is_none());
 7759|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 inf 2").is_none());
 7760|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 2 inf").is_none());
 7761|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("bad").is_none());
 7762|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.0), "10");
 7763|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.5), "10.5");
 7764|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(0.0), "0");
 7765|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.123), "10.123");
 7766|       |        let nan = MermaidWorker::format_dim(f32::NAN);
 7767|       |        assert!(!nan.contains('.'));
 7768|       |        assert!(nan.to_lowercase().contains("nan"));
 7769|       |    }

 7884|       |    #[test]
 7885|       |    fn test_enqueue_mermaid_job_disconnected() {
 7886|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7887|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7888|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7889|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7890|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7891|       |            svg_key: 1,
 7892|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 7893|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7894|       |            svg: None,
 7895|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 7896|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 7897|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7898|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7899|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 7900|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 7901|       |        };
 7902|       |        assert_eq!(
 7903|       |            renderer.enqueue_mermaid_job(request),
 7904|       |            Err(MermaidEnqueueError::Disconnected)
 7905|       |        );
 7906|       |    }

 7908|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7909|       |    #[test]
 7910|       |    fn test_render_block_enqueues_cached_svg() {
 7911|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7912|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7913|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7914|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7915|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7916|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7917|       |        renderer
 7918|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 7919|       |            .borrow_mut()
 7920|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg></svg>".to_string());
 7921|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7922|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 120.0);
 7923|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7924|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7925|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7926|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7927|       |            });
 7928|       |        });
 7929|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7930|       |        let request = job_rx
 7931|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 7932|       |            .expect("request");
 7933|       |        assert!(request.svg.is_some());
 7934|       |        assert!(request.code.is_none());
 7935|       |    }

 7937|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7938|       |    #[test]
 7939|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_init_error() {
 7940|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7941|       |        force_mermaid_worker_init_error_once();
 7942|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7943|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7944|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 7945|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7946|       |            svg_key: 2,
 7947|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 7948|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7949|       |            svg: None,
 7950|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 7951|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 7952|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7953|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7954|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 7955|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 7956|       |        };
 7957|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("send");
 7958|       |        let result = result_rx
 7959|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 7960|       |            .expect("result");
 7961|       |        assert!(result.error.is_some());
 7962|       |        drop(job_tx);
 7963|       |        for handle in handles {
 7964|       |            let _ = handle.join();
 7965|       |        }
 7966|       |    }
 7967|       |
 7968|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7969|       |    #[test]
 7970|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_spawn_error() {
 7971|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7972|       |        force_mermaid_thread_spawn_error_once();
 7973|       |        let (_job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7974|       |        let (result_tx, _result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7975|       |        let expected_count = MermaidRenderer::mermaid_worker_count();
 7976|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 7977|       |        // One spawn was forced to fail, so we should have fewer than expected
 7978|       |        assert!(
 7979|       |            handles.len() < expected_count,
 7980|       |            "expected fewer than {} handles due to forced spawn error, got {}",
 7981|       |            expected_count,
 7982|       |            handles.len()
 7983|       |        );
 7984|       |    }

 7986|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7987|       |    #[test]
 7988|       |    fn test_mermaid_worker_init_error_stages() {
 7989|       |        let fontdb = test_fontdb();
 7990|       |
 7991|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(1);
 7992|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 7993|       |            .err()
 7994|       |            .expect("stage 1 err");
 7995|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 7996|       |
 7997|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(2);
 7998|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 7999|       |            .err()
 8000|       |            .expect("stage 2 err");
 8001|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 8002|       |
 8003|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(3);
 8004|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8005|       |            .err()
 8006|       |            .expect("stage 3 err");
 8007|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid DOM shim"));
 8008|       |
 8009|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(4);
 8010|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8011|       |            .err()
 8012|       |            .expect("stage 4 err");
 8013|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid JS"));
 8014|       |
 8015|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(5);
 8016|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8017|       |            .err()
 8018|       |            .expect("stage 5 err");
 8019|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid init"));
 8020|       |    }

 8023|       |    #[test]
 8024|       |    fn test_mermaid_worker_new_runtime_error_forced() {
 8025|       |        force_mermaid_runtime_error_once();
 8026|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, test_fontdb())
 8027|       |            .err()
 8028|       |            .expect("runtime err");
 8029|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid runtime init error"));
 8030|       |    }
 8031|       |
 8032|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8033|       |    #[test]
 8034|       |    fn test_mermaid_runtime_flag_mismatch_restores() {
 8035|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| {
 8036|       |            force_mermaid_runtime_error_once();
 8037|       |        });
 8038|       |        handle.join().expect("flag thread");
 8039|       |
 8040|       |        let _ = runtime_new_for_test().expect("runtime ok");
 8041|       |
 8042|       |        let mut guard = FORCE_MERMAID_RUNTIME_ERROR
 8043|       |            .lock()
 8044|       |            .expect("mermaid runtime flag lock");
 8045|       |        *guard = None;
 8046|       |    }
 8047|       |
 8048|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8049|       |    #[test]

 8051|       |        force_mermaid_context_error_once();
 8052|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, test_fontdb())
 8053|       |            .err()
 8054|       |            .expect("context err");
 8055|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid context init error"));
 8056|       |    }

 8114|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8115|       |    #[test]
 8116|       |    fn test_svg_helper_early_returns() {
 8117|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg"), "<svg");
 8118|       |        assert_eq!(
 8119|       |            MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"),
 8120|       |            "<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"
 8121|       |        );
 8122|       |        assert_eq!(
 8123|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_attr("<svg width=\"100", "width", "200"),
 8124|       |            "<svg width=\"100"
 8125|       |        );
 8126|       |        assert_eq!(
 8127|       |            MermaidWorker::upsert_attr("<svg width=\"100\"", "height", "200"),
 8128|       |            "<svg width=\"100\""
 8129|       |        );
 8130|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::flatten_svg_switches("<switch").is_none());
 8131|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_journey_section_text("<text journey-section", "#fff").is_none());
 8132|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"").is_none());
 8133|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"></g").is_none());
 8134|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_er_attribute_fills("<rect class=\"attributeBoxOdd\"").is_none());
 8135|       |        assert_eq!(
 8136|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg>", "width", "1"),
 8137|       |            "<svg>"
 8138|       |        );
 8139|       |        assert_eq!(
 8140|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg width=\"100>", "width", "1"),
 8141|       |            "<svg width=\"100>"
 8142|       |        );
 8143|       |        assert_eq!(
 8144|       |            MermaidWorker::insert_svg_attr("no svg", "width", "1"),
 8145|       |            "no svg"
 8146|       |        );
 8147|       |    }

 8210|       |    #[test]
 8211|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_unknown_tag_passthrough() {
 8212|       |        // Unknown tags (like <span>, or SVG elements like <tspan>) pass through unchanged
 8213|       |        // This is essential to preserve existing SVG structure
 8214|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;span&gt;text&lt;/span&gt;</text>";
 8215|       |        let expected = "<text><span>text</span></text>";
 8216|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8217|       |    }
 8218|       |
 8219|       |    #[test]
 8220|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_preserves_existing_svg_tspan() {
 8221|       |        // Critical: existing SVG tspan elements must be preserved unchanged
 8222|       |        // This is the real-world case from Mermaid output
 8223|       |        let input =
 8224|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;
 8225|       |        let expected =
 8226|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;
 8227|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8228|       |    }
 8229|       |
 8230|       |    #[test]
 8231|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mixed_svg_and_html_tags() {
 8232|       |        // HTML tags inside existing SVG tspan should still be converted
 8233|       |        let input = r#"<text><tspan dy="1em">&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;</tspan></text>"#;
 8234|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8235|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"<tspan dy="1em">"#)); // Preserve outer tspan
 8236|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"font-weight="bold""#)); // Convert HTML bold
 8237|       |    }

 8296|       |    #[test]
 8297|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mismatched_tags() {
 8298|       |        // <b>a<i>b</b>c</i> - close b while i is open
 8299|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;b&gt;a&lt;i&gt;b&lt;/b&gt;c&lt;/i&gt;</text>";
 8300|       |        // Expected: close i and b at </b>, reopen i for c, close i at </i>
 8301|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8302|       |        // Should contain proper tspan nesting
 8303|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-weight=\"bold\">"));
 8304|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-style=\"italic\">"));
 8305|       |        // Should not contain escaped tags
 8306|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;b&gt;"));
 8307|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;i&gt;"));
 8308|       |    }

 8415|       |
 8416|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8417|       |    #[test]
 8418|       |    fn test_release_gpu_textures_preserves_svg_cache() {
 8419|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8420|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8421|       |
 8422|       |        // Create a test texture and add to texture cache
 8423|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8424|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8425|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8426|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8427|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8428|       |                let texture =
 8429|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8430|       |                        .load_texture("test-mermaid", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8431|       |
 8432|       |                // Insert into texture cache
 8433|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 8434|       |                    "test-texture-key".to_string(),
 8435|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 8436|       |                        texture,
 8437|       |                        size: [100, 100],
 8438|       |                    },
 8439|       |                );
 8440|       |            });
 8441|       |        });
 8442|       |
 8443|       |        // Insert into SVG cache
 8444|       |        let svg_key = hash_str("graph TD; A-->B;");
 8445|       |        renderer
 8446|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8447|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8448|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg>test</svg>".to_string());
 8449|       |
 8450|       |        // Verify both caches are populated
 8451|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 1);
 8452|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8453|       |
 8454|       |        // Call release_gpu_textures
 8455|       |        renderer.release_gpu_textures();
 8456|       |
 8457|       |        // Assert texture cache is EMPTY
 8458|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 0);
 8459|       |
 8460|       |        // Assert SVG cache is NOT EMPTY (still has entries)
 8461|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8462|       |    }
 8463|       |
 8464|       |    // ---- Resize debounce tests ----
 8465|       |
 8466|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8467|       |    #[test]
 8468|       |    fn test_parse_width_from_texture_key() {
 8469|       |        let key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0xABCD, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8470|       |        assert_eq!(
 8471|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key),
 8472|       |            Some(320)
 8473|       |        );
 8474|       |
 8475|       |        let key2 = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0x1234, 1024, 200, [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 8476|       |        assert_eq!(
 8477|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key2),
 8478|       |            Some(1024)
 8479|       |        );
 8480|       |
 8481|       |        // Malformed keys
 8482|       |        assert_eq!(
 8483|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("no-w-here"),
 8484|       |            None
 8485|       |        );
 8486|       |        assert_eq!(
 8487|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("mermaid:abc:wNOT_A_NUM:s100:bg00000000"),
 8488|       |            None
 8489|       |        );
 8490|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(":w32"), None);
 8491|       |        // no trailing ':'
 8492|       |    }

 8496|       |    fn test_latest_texture_index_updated_on_store() {
 8497|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8498|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8499|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8500|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8501|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8502|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8503|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8504|       |                let tex =
 8505|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8506|       |                        .load_texture("test-latest", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8507|       |
 8508|       |                let svg_key: u64 = 42;

 8516|       |                assert_eq!(
 8517|       |                    renderer.mermaid_latest_texture.borrow().get(&svg_key),
 8518|       |                    Some(&"key_v2".to_string())
 8519|       |                );

 8524|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8525|       |    #[test]
 8526|       |    fn test_stale_result_skips_gpu_upload() {
 8527|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8528|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8529|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8530|       |
 8531|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 100;
 8532|       |        let texture_key_old = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8533|       |        let _texture_key_new = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 640, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8534|       |
 8535|       |        // Set wanted bucket to 640 (different from result's 320)
 8536|       |        renderer
 8537|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8538|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8539|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8540|       |
 8541|       |        renderer
 8542|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8543|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8544|       |            .insert(texture_key_old.clone());
 8545|       |
 8546|       |        result_tx
 8547|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8548|       |                svg_key,
 8549|       |                texture_key: texture_key_old.clone(),
 8550|       |                svg: Some("<svg>test</svg>".to_string()),
 8551|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 8552|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 8553|       |                error: None,
 8554|       |            })
 8555|       |            .expect("send");
 8556|       |
 8557|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8558|       |
 8559|       |        // SVG should be cached (always cached regardless of staleness)
 8560|       |        assert!(renderer
 8561|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8562|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8563|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8564|       |            .is_some());
 8565|       |
 8566|       |        // Texture should NOT be uploaded (stale result)
 8567|       |        assert!(renderer
 8568|       |            .mermaid_textures
 8569|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8570|       |            .get(&texture_key_old)
 8571|       |            .is_none());
 8572|       |
 8573|       |        // Pending should be cleared
 8574|       |        assert!(!renderer.mermaid_pending.borrow().contains(&texture_key_old));
 8575|       |    }

 8578|       |    #[test]
 8579|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_svg() {
 8580|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8581|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8582|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8583|       |
 8584|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 200;
 8585|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8586|       |
 8587|       |        // Wanted bucket differs from result
 8588|       |        renderer
 8589|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8590|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8591|       |            .insert(svg_key, 512);
 8592|       |
 8593|       |        renderer
 8594|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8595|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8596|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8597|       |
 8598|       |        result_tx
 8599|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8600|       |                svg_key,
 8601|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8602|       |                svg: Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()),
 8603|       |                rgba: None,
 8604|       |                size: None,
 8605|       |                error: None,
 8606|       |            })
 8607|       |            .expect("send");
 8608|       |
 8609|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8610|       |
 8611|       |        // SVG cached even for stale result
 8612|       |        let cached_svg = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key);
 8613|       |        assert_eq!(cached_svg, Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()));
 8614|       |    }

 8617|       |    #[test]
 8618|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_error() {
 8619|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8620|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8621|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8622|       |
 8623|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 300;
 8624|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8625|       |
 8626|       |        // Wanted bucket differs
 8627|       |        renderer
 8628|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8629|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8630|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8631|       |
 8632|       |        renderer
 8633|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8634|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8635|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8636|       |
 8637|       |        // Send a result with error but no SVG (QuickJS failure)
 8638|       |        result_tx
 8639|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8640|       |                svg_key,
 8641|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8642|       |                svg: None,
 8643|       |                rgba: None,
 8644|       |                size: None,
 8645|       |                error: Some("QuickJS crashed".to_string()),
 8646|       |            })
 8647|       |            .expect("send");
 8648|       |
 8649|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8650|       |
 8651|       |        // Error should be cached even for stale result (prevents infinite re-render)
 8652|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key).is_some());
 8653|       |    }

 8655|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8656|       |    #[test]
 8657|       |    fn test_first_render_no_debounce_delay() {
 8658|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(4);
 8659|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(4);
 8660|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8661|       |
 8662|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8663|       |        let code = "graph TD; First-->Render;";
 8664|       |
 8665|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8666|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8667|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8668|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8669|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8670|       |            });
 8671|       |        });
 8672|       |
 8673|       |        // Job should be enqueued immediately (no debounce on first render)
 8674|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8675|       |
 8676|       |        // Debounce entry should exist after successful enqueue
 8677|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8678|       |        assert!(renderer
 8679|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8680|       |            .borrow()
 8681|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));
 8682|       |
 8683|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8684|       |    }

 8686|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8687|       |    #[test]
 8688|       |    fn test_first_render_queue_full_no_debounce_entry() {
 8689|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8690|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8691|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 8692|       |
 8693|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8694|       |
 8695|       |        // Fill the queue first
 8696|       |        let filler = MermaidRequest {
 8697|       |            svg_key: 1,
 8698|       |            texture_key: "filler".to_string(),
 8699|       |            code: Some("graph TD; Fill-->Queue;".to_string()),
 8700|       |            svg: None,
 8701|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 8702|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 8703|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 8704|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 8705|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 8706|       |            theme,
 8707|       |        };
 8708|       |        job_tx.send(filler).expect("fill queue");
 8709|       |
 8710|       |        let code = "graph TD; New-->Diagram;";
 8711|       |
 8712|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8713|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8714|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8715|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8716|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8717|       |            });
 8718|       |        });
 8719|       |
 8720|       |        // No debounce entry should be created on QueueFull
 8721|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8722|       |        assert!(!renderer
 8723|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8724|       |            .borrow()
 8725|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));
 8726|       |
 8727|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8728|       |    }

 8730|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8731|       |    #[test]
 8732|       |    fn test_debounce_suppresses_enqueue_during_resize() {
 8733|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8734|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8735|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8736|       |
 8737|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8738|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 8739|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8740|       |
 8741|       |        // First render at width 400 — should enqueue immediately
 8742|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8743|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8744|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8745|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8746|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8747|       |            });
 8748|       |        });
 8749|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8750|       |
 8751|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 (different bucket) within debounce window
 8752|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8753|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8754|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8755|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8756|       |            });
 8757|       |        });
 8758|       |
 8759|       |        // Should NOT have enqueued a second job (debounce active)
 8760|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8761|       |
 8762|       |        // Debounce entry should still point to the first enqueued width.
 8763|       |        // The second render at 600px was suppressed by debounce.
 8764|       |        let debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow();
 8765|       |        let entry = debounce.get(&svg_key).expect("debounce entry should exist");
 8766|       |        // last_seen_bucket should have moved to the new width
 8767|       |        assert_ne!(entry.last_seen_bucket, entry.last_enqueued_bucket);
 8768|       |
 8769|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8770|       |    }
 8771|       |
 8772|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8773|       |    #[test]
 8774|       |    fn test_debounce_fires_after_cooldown() {
 8775|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8776|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8777|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8778|       |
 8779|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8780|       |        let code = "graph TD; C-->D;";
 8781|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8782|       |
 8783|       |        // First render at width 400
 8784|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8785|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8786|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8787|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8788|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8789|       |            });
 8790|       |        });
 8791|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8792|       |
 8793|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 — triggers debounce
 8794|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8795|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8796|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8797|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8798|       |            });
 8799|       |        });
 8800|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1); // Still just 1 (debounced)
 8801|       |
 8802|       |        // Force the debounce timer to appear expired by backdating bucket_changed_at
 8803|       |        {
 8804|       |            let mut debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut();
 8805|       |            let entry = debounce.get_mut(&svg_key).unwrap();
 8806|       |            entry.bucket_changed_at = Some(
 8807|       |                Instant::now() - std::time::Duration::from_millis(MERMAID_RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS + 50),
 8808|       |            );
 8809|       |        }
 8810|       |
 8811|       |        // Re-render at width 600 — debounce should have expired, enqueue fires
 8812|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8813|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 8814|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8815|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8816|       |            });
 8817|       |        });
 8818|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 2); // Now 2 — debounce expired
 8819|       |
 8820|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8821|       |    }
 8822|       |
 8823|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8824|       |    #[test]
 8825|       |    fn test_debounce_resets_on_continued_resize() {
 8826|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8827|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8828|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8829|       |
 8830|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8831|       |        let code = "graph TD; E-->F;";
 8832|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8833|       |
 8834|       |        // First render at width 400
 8835|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8836|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8837|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8838|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8839|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8840|       |            });
 8841|       |        });
 8842|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8843|       |
 8844|       |        // Width change A→B
 8845|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(500.0, 300.0);
 8846|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8847|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8848|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8849|       |            });
 8850|       |        });
 8851|       |        let changed_at_b = renderer
 8852|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8853|       |            .borrow()
 8854|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8855|       |            .unwrap()
 8856|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 8857|       |            .unwrap();
 8858|       |
 8859|       |        // Width change B→C — timer should reset
 8860|       |        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(10));
 8861|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 8862|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 8863|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8864|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8865|       |            });
 8866|       |        });
 8867|       |        let changed_at_c = renderer
 8868|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8869|       |            .borrow()
 8870|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8871|       |            .unwrap()
 8872|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 8873|       |            .unwrap();
 8874|       |
 8875|       |        // Timer was reset on B→C transition
 8876|       |        assert!(changed_at_c > changed_at_b);
 8877|       |
 8878|       |        // Still only 1 job enqueued (all debounced)
 8879|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8880|       |
 8881|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8882|       |    }
 8883|       |
 8884|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8885|       |    #[test]
 8886|       |    fn test_debounce_trailing_edge_timer_reset() {
 8887|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8888|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8889|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8890|       |
 8891|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8892|       |        let code = "graph TD; G-->H;";
 8893|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8894|       |
 8895|       |        // First render at width 400
 8896|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8897|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8898|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8899|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8900|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8901|       |            });
 8902|       |        });
 8903|       |
 8904|       |        // Width change to 500
 8905|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(500.0, 300.0);
 8906|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8907|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8908|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8909|       |            });
 8910|       |        });
 8911|       |
 8912|       |        // Backdate timer so it's almost expired but not quite
 8913|       |        {
 8914|       |            let mut debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut();
 8915|       |            let entry = debounce.get_mut(&svg_key).unwrap();
 8916|       |            entry.bucket_changed_at = Some(
 8917|       |                Instant::now() - std::time::Duration::from_millis(MERMAID_RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS - 20),
 8918|       |            );
 8919|       |        }
 8920|       |
 8921|       |        // Width change to 600 — should reset the timer (trailing edge)
 8922|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8923|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 8924|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8925|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8926|       |            });
 8927|       |        });
 8928|       |
 8929|       |        // Timer should have been freshly reset (close to now)
 8930|       |        let changed_at = renderer
 8931|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8932|       |            .borrow()
 8933|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8934|       |            .unwrap()
 8935|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 8936|       |            .unwrap();
 8937|       |        assert!(changed_at.elapsed().as_millis() < 50);
 8938|       |
 8939|       |        // Still only 1 enqueue (original)
 8940|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8941|       |
 8942|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8943|       |    }
 8944|       |
 8945|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8946|       |    #[test]
 8947|       |    fn test_theme_change_clears_debounce_state() {

C:\language\mdmdview\src\pikchr_renderer.rs:
    1|       |//! Pikchr diagram renderer.
    2|       |//!
    3|       |//! Renders Pikchr markup to SVG using the embedded pikchr C library,
    4|       |//! then rasterizes SVG to egui textures via usvg/resvg. Heavy rendering
    5|       |//! work (Pikchr C call + SVG rasterization) runs on a dedicated worker
    6|       |//! thread; the main thread only handles the cheap GPU texture upload.
    7|       |//!
    8|       |//! Key components:
    9|       |//! - `PikchrRenderer` struct: holds font database, caches, and worker channels
   10|       |//! - `LruCache<K, V>`: generic LRU cache (shared module in lru_cache.rs)
   11|       |//! - `render_pikchr_to_svg()`: static method wrapping the pikchr C library
   12|       |//! - `rasterize_svg()`: pure function: SVG string -> RGBA bytes (runs on worker)
   13|       |//! - `poll_results()`: drains worker results, uploads textures to GPU (main thread)
   14|       |//!
   15|       |//! This module is conditionally compiled behind `#[cfg(feature = "pikchr")]`.
   16|       |//! It integrates with `MarkdownRenderer` following the same public API pattern
   17|       |//! as `MermaidRenderer` (render_block, begin_frame, has_pending, release_gpu_textures).
   18|       |
   19|       |use std::cell::RefCell;
   20|       |use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};
   21|       |use std::sync::Arc;
   22|       |use std::time::{Duration, Instant};
   23|       |
   24|       |use crossbeam_channel::{Receiver, Sender, TrySendError};
   25|       |
   26|       |use crate::lru_cache::{hash_str, LruCache};
   27|       |use crate::ThemeColors;
   28|       |
   29|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   30|       |// Cache capacity constants
   31|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   32|       |
   33|       |const PIKCHR_TEXTURE_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
   34|       |const PIKCHR_SVG_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
   35|       |const PIKCHR_ERROR_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 32;
   36|       |/// Trailing-edge debounce cooldown for resize. During window resize, suppress
   37|       |/// rasterization enqueue and show the last rendered texture scaled to fit.
   38|       |/// Only enqueue a new rasterization job once the width stabilizes for this
   39|       |/// duration.
   40|       |const RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS: u64 = 150;
   41|       |/// Maximum rasterized dimension (width or height) in pixels.
   42|       |/// Matches the cap used by mermaid_renderer.
   43|       |const MAX_RASTER_SIDE: u32 = 4096;
   44|       |/// Rasterization supersample factor. Pikchr SVGs have compact viewBox
   45|       |/// dimensions (a single box is ~67x35 units), so rasterizing at 1x
   46|       |/// produces textures with insufficient pixel density for crisp text.
   47|       |/// 2x gives 4x the pixels, making anti-aliased text and thin lines
   48|       |/// look sharp -- the standard "retina rendering" approach.
   49|       |const PIKCHR_SUPERSAMPLE: f32 = 2.0;
   50|       |/// Bounded channel capacity for job and result channels. With debounce
   51|       |/// suppressing enqueue during resize, at most one job per diagram is
   52|       |/// enqueued after the debounce expires. A document with ~6-8 diagrams
   53|       |/// fits within 8 slots. The bounded channel provides natural backpressure
   54|       |/// if the worker falls behind.
   55|       |const CHANNEL_CAPACITY: usize = 8;
   56|       |
   57|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   58|       |// Channel type aliases
   59|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   60|       |
   61|       |type JobSender = Sender<RasterJob>;
   62|       |type JobReceiver = Receiver<RasterJob>;
   63|       |type ResultSender = Sender<RasterResult>;
   64|       |type ResultReceiver = Receiver<RasterResult>;
   65|       |

  106|       |}

  135|     16|fn svg_cache_key(code_hash: u64, dark_mode: bool) -> u128 {
  136|     16|    ((code_hash as u128) << 1) | (dark_mode as u128)
  137|     16|}

  167|       |
  168|       |/// Pikchr diagram renderer.
  169|       |///
  170|       |/// Renders Pikchr markup to SVG using the embedded pikchr C library,
  171|       |/// then rasterizes SVG to egui textures via usvg/resvg. Heavy rendering
  172|       |/// runs on a dedicated worker thread; the main thread only uploads the
  173|       |/// resulting RGBA data to the GPU (~0.1-1ms).
  174|       |pub(crate) struct PikchrRenderer {
  175|       |    /// LRU cache: texture_key (String) -> (TextureHandle, [width, height])
  176|       |    textures: RefCell<LruCache<String, PikchrTextureEntry>>,
  177|       |    /// SVG cache: svg_cache_key (u128: code_hash << 1 | dark_mode) -> SVG string
  178|       |    svg_cache: RefCell<LruCache<u128, String>>,
  179|       |    /// Error cache: code_hash (u64) -> error message.
  180|       |    /// Errors don't depend on dark_mode, only on source syntax.
  181|       |    errors: RefCell<LruCache<u64, String>>,
  182|       |    /// Per-diagram debounce state for resize suppression.
  183|       |    debounce: RefCell<HashMap<u64, DiagramDebounce>>,
  184|       |    /// Maps code_hash -> texture_key of the most recently rasterized texture.
  185|       |    /// Used to display a stale texture scaled to fit during debounce cooldown.
  186|       |    latest_texture_key: RefCell<HashMap<u64, String>>,
  187|       |    /// Job sender. Wrapped in Option so Drop can close the channel
  188|       |    /// before joining the worker thread (same pattern as Mermaid).
  189|       |    job_tx: Option<JobSender>,
  190|       |    /// Result receiver. Polled each frame in poll_results().
  191|       |    result_rx: ResultReceiver,
  192|       |    /// Worker thread handle. Joined on drop for clean shutdown.
  193|       |    worker_handle: Option<std::thread::JoinHandle<()>>,
  194|       |    /// Set of code_hashes with in-flight jobs. Keyed by code_hash (not
  195|       |    /// texture_key) to prevent redundant enqueues when the width changes
  196|       |    /// while a job is already pending for the same diagram.
  197|       |    pending: RefCell<HashSet<u64>>,
  198|       |    /// Tracks the currently desired width bucket per diagram (for stale discard).
  199|       |    wanted_bucket: RefCell<HashMap<u64, u32>>,
  200|       |}
  201|       |
  202|       |impl PikchrRenderer {
  203|       |    /// Create a new PikchrRenderer, loading system fonts once at startup.
  204|       |    /// Without system fonts, usvg's default empty fontdb silently drops all
  205|       |    /// text labels in rasterized SVGs. Takes ~50-200ms (one-time cost).
  206|       |    /// Spawns a dedicated worker thread for background rasterization.
  207|       |    /// Same pattern as mermaid_renderer.rs and image_decode.rs.
  208|    880|    pub(crate) fn new() -> Self {
  209|    880|        let mut db = usvg::fontdb::Database::new();
  210|    880|        db.load_system_fonts();
  211|    880|        let fontdb = Arc::new(db);
  212|       |
  213|    880|        let (job_tx, job_rx) = crossbeam_channel::bounded(CHANNEL_CAPACITY);
  214|    880|        let (result_tx, result_rx) = crossbeam_channel::bounded(CHANNEL_CAPACITY);
  215|       |
  216|       |        // Clone fontdb for the worker thread
  217|    880|        let worker_fontdb = Arc::clone(&fontdb);
  218|    880|        let worker_handle = std::thread::Builder::new()
  219|    880|            .name("pikchr-raster".into())
  220|    880|            .spawn(move || {
  221|    880|                Self::worker_loop(worker_fontdb, job_rx, result_tx);
  222|    880|            })
  223|    880|            .expect("failed to spawn pikchr raster worker");
  224|       |
  225|    880|        Self {
  226|    880|            textures: RefCell::new(LruCache::new(PIKCHR_TEXTURE_CACHE_CAPACITY)),
  227|    880|            svg_cache: RefCell::new(LruCache::new(PIKCHR_SVG_CACHE_CAPACITY)),
  228|    880|            errors: RefCell::new(LruCache::new(PIKCHR_ERROR_CACHE_CAPACITY)),
  229|    880|            debounce: RefCell::new(HashMap::new()),
  230|    880|            latest_texture_key: RefCell::new(HashMap::new()),
  231|    880|            job_tx: Some(job_tx),
  232|    880|            result_rx,
  233|    880|            worker_handle: Some(worker_handle),
  234|    880|            pending: RefCell::new(HashSet::new()),
  235|    880|            wanted_bucket: RefCell::new(HashMap::new()),
  236|    880|        }
  237|    880|    }
  238|       |
  239|       |    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  240|       |    // Worker thread
  241|       |    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  242|       |
  243|       |    /// Main loop for the worker thread. Receives jobs, processes them, and
  244|       |    /// sends results back. Uses `try_send` to avoid blocking if the result
  245|       |    /// channel is full (prevents shutdown deadlock). Same pattern as Mermaid
  246|       |    /// (mermaid_renderer.rs line 1264-1269).
  247|    888|    fn worker_loop(
  248|    888|        fontdb: Arc<usvg::fontdb::Database>,
  249|    888|        job_rx: JobReceiver,
  250|    888|        result_tx: ResultSender,
  251|    888|    ) {
  252|    896|        while let Ok(job) = job_rx.recv() {
                                   ^8
  ------------------
  |  Branch (252:19): [True: 8, False: 888]
  ------------------
  253|      8|            let result = Self::process_job(&fontdb, job);
  254|      8|            // Use try_send to avoid blocking if result channel is full.
  255|      8|            // This prevents deadlock during shutdown: if Drop joins workers
  256|      8|            // while they're blocked on send (because result_rx isn't being
  257|      8|            // polled), we'd hang forever. Dropping results is acceptable --
  258|      8|            // the main thread still has the code_hash in the pending set, so
  259|      8|            // render_block will show the stale texture or placeholder and the
  260|      8|            // pending entry will be leaked (harmless, cleared on next
  261|      8|            // release_gpu_textures or app restart).
  262|      8|            let _ = result_tx.try_send(result);
  263|      8|        }
  264|       |        // job_rx disconnected (main thread dropped job_tx) -- exit
  265|    888|    }

  320|       |    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  321|       |    // Rasterization (runs on worker thread)
