  830|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
  831|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
  832|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
  833|       |
  834|       |        std::fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
  835|       |        let config = config_dir.join("window_state.txt");
  836|       |
  837|       |        std::fs::write(&config, "10 y 30 40 1").expect("write bad data");
  838|       |        assert!(load_window_state().is_none());
  839|       |
  840|       |        std::fs::write(&config, "10 20 w 40 1").expect("write bad data");
  841|       |        assert!(load_window_state().is_none());
  842|       |
  843|       |        std::fs::write(&config, "10 20 30 h 1").expect("write bad data");
  844|       |        assert!(load_window_state().is_none());
  845|       |    }

  885|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
  886|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
  887|       |        let _guard_appdata = EnvGuard::unset("APPDATA");
  888|       |        let _guard_home = EnvGuard::unset("HOME");
  889|       |        let _guard_xdg = EnvGuard::set("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", temp.path().to_string_lossy().as_ref());
  890|       |
  891|       |        let dir = config_dir().expect("config dir");
  892|       |        assert!(dir.starts_with(temp.path()));
  893|       |        assert!(dir.ends_with("mdmdview"));
  894|       |    }

 1116|       |    #[test]
 1117|       |    fn test_load_window_state_parses_maximized_true_capital() {
 1118|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1119|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1120|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1121|       |
 1122|       |        std::fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
 1123|       |        let config = config_dir.join("window_state.txt");
 1124|       |        std::fs::write(&config, "10 20 300 400 True").expect("write data");
 1125|       |
 1126|       |        let loaded = load_window_state().expect("load");
 1127|       |        assert!(loaded.maximized);
 1128|       |    }
 1129|       |

 1158|       |    #[test]
 1159|       |    fn test_sanitize_window_state_infinity_rejected() {
 1160|       |        let invalid = WindowState {
 1161|       |            pos: [f32::INFINITY, 10.0],
 1162|       |            size: [800.0, 600.0],
 1163|       |            maximized: false,
 1164|       |        };
 1165|       |        assert!(sanitize_window_state(invalid).is_none());
 1166|       |
 1167|       |        let invalid2 = WindowState {
 1168|       |            pos: [10.0, f32::NEG_INFINITY],
 1169|       |            size: [800.0, 600.0],
 1170|       |            maximized: false,
 1171|       |        };
 1172|       |        assert!(sanitize_window_state(invalid2).is_none());
 1173|       |    }

 1178|       |            pos: [10.0, 20.0],
 1179|       |            size: [f32::INFINITY, 600.0],
 1180|       |            maximized: false,
 1181|       |        };
 1182|       |        assert!(sanitize_window_state(invalid).is_none());
 1183|       |
 1184|       |        let invalid2 = WindowState {
 1185|       |            pos: [10.0, 20.0],
 1186|       |            size: [800.0, f32::NEG_INFINITY],
 1187|       |            maximized: false,
 1188|       |        };
 1189|       |        assert!(sanitize_window_state(invalid2).is_none());
 1190|       |    }

 1214|       |    // ========== dark_mode persistence tests ==========
 1215|       |
 1216|       |    #[test]
 1217|       |    fn test_dark_mode_default_inherits_os_dark() {
 1218|       |        force_os_dark_mode(true);
 1219|       |        assert!(AppSettings::default().dark_mode);
 1220|       |        reset_os_dark_mode();
 1221|       |    }
 1222|       |
 1223|       |    #[test]
 1224|       |    fn test_dark_mode_default_inherits_os_light() {
 1225|       |        force_os_dark_mode(false);
 1226|       |        assert!(!AppSettings::default().dark_mode);
 1227|       |        reset_os_dark_mode();
 1228|       |    }
 1229|       |
 1230|       |    #[test]
 1231|       |    fn test_settings_round_trip_dark_mode_true() {
 1232|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1233|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1234|       |        let (_guard, _config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1235|       |
 1236|       |        let settings = AppSettings {
 1237|       |            allow_remote_images: false,
 1238|       |            dark_mode: true,
 1239|       |            mermaid_theme: MermaidTheme::Auto,
 1240|       |        };
 1241|       |        save_app_settings(&settings).expect("save");
 1242|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1243|       |        assert!(loaded.dark_mode);
 1244|       |    }
 1245|       |
 1246|       |    #[test]
 1247|       |    fn test_settings_round_trip_dark_mode_false() {
 1248|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1249|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1250|       |        let (_guard, _config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1251|       |
 1252|       |        let settings = AppSettings {
 1253|       |            allow_remote_images: false,
 1254|       |            dark_mode: false,
 1255|       |            mermaid_theme: MermaidTheme::Auto,
 1256|       |        };
 1257|       |        save_app_settings(&settings).expect("save");
 1258|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1259|       |        assert!(!loaded.dark_mode);
 1260|       |    }
 1261|       |
 1262|       |    #[test]
 1263|       |    fn test_settings_missing_dark_mode_inherits_os_dark() {
 1264|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1265|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1266|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1267|       |
 1268|       |        force_os_dark_mode(true);
 1269|       |        fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
 1270|       |        let settings_path = config_dir.join("settings.txt");
 1271|       |        // File with only allow_remote_images — no dark_mode line
 1272|       |        fs::write(&settings_path, "allow_remote_images=0\n").expect("write");
 1273|       |
 1274|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1275|       |        assert!(loaded.dark_mode); // inherits OS dark mode
 1276|       |        reset_os_dark_mode();
 1277|       |    }
 1278|       |
 1279|       |    #[test]
 1280|       |    fn test_settings_missing_dark_mode_inherits_os_light() {
 1281|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1282|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1283|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1284|       |
 1285|       |        force_os_dark_mode(false);
 1286|       |        fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
 1287|       |        let settings_path = config_dir.join("settings.txt");
 1288|       |        // File with only allow_remote_images — no dark_mode line
 1289|       |        fs::write(&settings_path, "allow_remote_images=0\n").expect("write");
 1290|       |
 1291|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1292|       |        assert!(!loaded.dark_mode); // inherits OS light mode
 1293|       |        reset_os_dark_mode();
 1294|       |    }
 1295|       |
 1296|       |    #[test]
 1297|       |    fn test_settings_dark_mode_zero_is_false() {
 1298|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1299|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1300|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1301|       |
 1302|       |        fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
 1303|       |        let settings_path = config_dir.join("settings.txt");
 1304|       |        fs::write(&settings_path, "dark_mode=0\n").expect("write");
 1305|       |
 1306|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1307|       |        assert!(!loaded.dark_mode);
 1308|       |    }

 1310|       |    // ========== MermaidTheme Tests ==========
 1311|       |
 1312|       |    #[test]
 1313|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_resolve_auto_dark() {
 1314|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Auto.resolve(true), MermaidTheme::Dark);
 1315|       |    }
 1316|       |
 1317|       |    #[test]
 1318|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_resolve_auto_light() {
 1319|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Auto.resolve(false), MermaidTheme::Default);
 1320|       |    }
 1321|       |
 1322|       |    #[test]
 1323|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_resolve_explicit_passthrough() {
 1324|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Dark.resolve(false), MermaidTheme::Dark);
 1325|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Default.resolve(true), MermaidTheme::Default);
 1326|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Forest.resolve(true), MermaidTheme::Forest);
 1327|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Neutral.resolve(false), MermaidTheme::Neutral);
 1328|       |    }
 1329|       |
 1330|       |    #[test]
 1331|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_name() {
 1332|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Dark.theme_name(), "dark");
 1333|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Default.theme_name(), "default");
 1334|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Forest.theme_name(), "forest");
 1335|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Neutral.theme_name(), "neutral");
 1336|       |    }
 1337|       |
 1338|       |    #[test]
 1339|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_bg_fill() {
 1340|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Dark.bg_fill(), [20, 20, 20, 255]);
 1341|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(), [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 1342|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Forest.bg_fill(), [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 1343|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Neutral.bg_fill(), [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 1344|       |    }
 1345|       |
 1346|       |    #[test]
 1347|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_journey_text_fill() {
 1348|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Dark.journey_text_fill(), "#ccc");
 1349|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Default.journey_text_fill(), "#333");
 1350|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Forest.journey_text_fill(), "#333");
 1351|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Neutral.journey_text_fill(), "#333");
 1352|       |    }
 1353|       |
 1354|       |    #[test]
 1355|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_settings_roundtrip() {
 1356|       |        for theme in MermaidTheme::ALL {
 1357|       |            let s = theme.as_setting();
 1358|       |            let parsed = MermaidTheme::from_setting(s);
 1359|       |            assert_eq!(parsed, theme, "roundtrip failed for {s}");
 1360|       |        }
 1361|       |    }
 1362|       |
 1363|       |    #[test]
 1364|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_from_setting_unknown_defaults_to_auto() {
 1365|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::from_setting("bogus"), MermaidTheme::Auto);
 1366|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::from_setting(""), MermaidTheme::Auto);
 1367|       |    }
 1368|       |
 1369|       |    #[test]
 1370|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_from_setting_case_insensitive() {
 1371|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::from_setting("DARK"), MermaidTheme::Dark);
 1372|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::from_setting("Forest"), MermaidTheme::Forest);
 1373|       |        assert_eq!(
 1374|       |            MermaidTheme::from_setting(" neutral "),
 1375|       |            MermaidTheme::Neutral
 1376|       |        );
 1377|       |    }
 1378|       |
 1379|       |    #[test]
 1380|       |    fn test_mermaid_theme_label() {
 1381|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Auto.label(), "Auto");
 1382|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Dark.label(), "Dark");
 1383|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Default.label(), "Default");
 1384|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Forest.label(), "Forest");
 1385|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidTheme::Neutral.label(), "Neutral");
 1386|       |    }

 1388|       |    #[test]
 1389|       |    fn test_settings_persistence_mermaid_theme() {
 1390|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1391|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1392|       |        let (_guard, _config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1393|       |
 1394|       |        let settings = AppSettings {
 1395|       |            allow_remote_images: false,
 1396|       |            dark_mode: true,
 1397|       |            mermaid_theme: MermaidTheme::Forest,
 1398|       |        };
 1399|       |        save_app_settings(&settings).expect("save");
 1400|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1401|       |        assert_eq!(loaded.mermaid_theme, MermaidTheme::Forest);
 1402|       |    }
 1403|       |
 1404|       |    #[test]
 1405|       |    fn test_settings_missing_mermaid_theme_defaults_to_auto() {
 1406|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 1407|       |        let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp dir");
 1408|       |        let (_guard, config_dir) = set_config_env(temp.path());
 1409|       |
 1410|       |        fs::create_dir_all(&config_dir).expect("create config dir");
 1411|       |        let settings_path = config_dir.join("settings.txt");
 1412|       |        fs::write(&settings_path, "dark_mode=1\n").expect("write");
 1413|       |
 1414|       |        let loaded = load_app_settings();
 1415|       |        assert_eq!(loaded.mermaid_theme, MermaidTheme::Auto);
 1416|       |    }
